```
2. import BaseLayout from '../../layouts/BaseLayout.astro';
3. import PageHeader from '../../components/ui/PageHeader.astro';
4. import EventCard from '../../components/cards/EventCard.astro';
5. import { getCollection } from 'astro:content';
6. 
7. // Get all events
8. let allEvents: any[] = [];
9. try {
10.     allEvents = await getCollection('events');
11. } catch (e) {
12.     // Collection might not exist yet
13. }
14. 
15. // Separate upcoming and past events
16. const now = new Date();
17. const upcomingEvents = allEvents
18.     .filter(e => e.data.startDate >= now)
19.     .sort((a, b) => a.data.startDate.getTime() - b.data.startDate.getTime());
20. 
21. const pastEvents = allEvents
22.     .filter(e => e.data.startDate < now)
23.     .sort((a, b) => b.data.startDate.getTime() - a.data.startDate.getTime());
24. 
25. // Group past events by year
26. const pastEventsByYear = pastEvents.reduce((acc, event) => {
27.     const year = event.data.startDate.getFullYear();
28.     if (!acc[year]) acc[year] = [];
29.     acc[year].push(event);
30.     return acc;
31. }, {} as Record<number, any[]>);
32. 
33. const years = Object.keys(pastEventsByYear).sort((a, b) => Number(b) - Number(a));
34. 
35. function formatDateRange(start: Date, end?: Date): string {
36.     const utc = { timeZone: 'UTC' as const };
37.     if (!end || start.getTime() === end.getTime()) {
38.         return start.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'short', day: 'numeric', year: 'numeric', ...utc });
39.     }
40.     const sameMonth = start.getUTCMonth() === end.getUTCMonth() && start.getUTCFullYear() === end.getUTCFullYear();
41.     if (sameMonth) {
42.         return `${start.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'short', day: 'numeric', ...utc })} - ${end.getUTCDate()}, ${end.getUTCFullYear()}`;
43.     }
44.     return `${start.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'short', day: 'numeric', ...utc })} - ${end.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'short', day: 'numeric', year: 'numeric', ...utc })}`;
45. }
46. 
47. function formatLocation(loc: any): string {
48.     if (loc.virtual) return 'Virtual';
49.     const parts = [loc.city];
50.     if (loc.state) parts.push(loc.state);
51.     parts.push(loc.country);
52.     return parts.join(', ');
53. }
54. ---
55. 
56. <BaseLayout 
57.     title="Speaking Engagements" 
58.     description="Upcoming and past speaking engagements by Chad Green at conferences, meetups, and events worldwide."
59. >
60.     <PageHeader title="Speaking Engagements">
61.         <p>Conferences, meetups, and events where I've spoken or will be speaking</p>
62.     </PageHeader>
63. 
64.     <!-- Upcoming Events -->
65.     <section class="section">
66.         <div class="container">
67.             <h2 class="section-title">Upcoming Events</h2>
68. 
69.             {upcomingEvents.length > 0 ? (
70.                 <div class="upcoming-grid grid grid-3">
71.                     {upcomingEvents.map((event) => (
72.                         <EventCard
73.                             title={event.data.title}
74.                             slug={event.id}
75.                             startDate={event.data.startDate}
76.                             endDate={event.data.endDate}
77.                             location={event.data.location}
78.                             heroImage={event.data.heroImage}
79.                             eventType={event.data.eventType}
80.                             status="upcoming"
81.                             eventUrl={event.data.eventUrl}
82.                             featured={event.data.featured}
83.                         />
84.                     ))}
85.                 </div>
86.             ) : (
87.                 <div class="empty-state">
88.                     <p>No upcoming events scheduled. Check back soon!</p>
89.                 </div>
90.             )}
91.         </div>
92.     </section>
93. 
94.     <!-- Past Events by Year -->
95.     {years.length > 0 && (
96.         <section class="section section-alt">
97.             <div class="container">
98.                 <h2 class="section-title">Past Events</h2>
99. 
100.                 {years.map((year) => (
101.                     <div class="year-section">
102.                         <h3 class="year-heading">{year}</h3>
103.                         <div class="events-table">
104.                             <table>
105.                                 <thead>
106.                                     <tr>
107.                                         <th>Date</th>
108.                                         <th>Event</th>
109.                                         <th>Location</th>
110.                                     </tr>
111.                                 </thead>
112.                                 <tbody>
113.                                     {pastEventsByYear[Number(year)].map((event: any) => (
114.                                         <tr>
115.                                             <td class="date-col">
116.                                                 {formatDateRange(event.data.startDate, event.data.endDate)}
117.                                             </td>
118.                                             <td class="event-col">
119.                                                 <a href={`/speaking/${event.id}`}>{event.data.title}</a>
120.                                             </td>
121.                                             <td class="location-col">
122.                                                 {formatLocation(event.data.location)}
123.                                             </td>
124.                                         </tr>
125.                                     ))}
126.                                 </tbody>
127.                             </table>
128.                         </div>
129.                     </div>
130.                 ))}
131.             </div>
132.         </section>
133.     )}
134. </BaseLayout>
135. 
136. <style>
137.     .section-title {
138.         margin-bottom: var(--spacing-8);
139.     }
140. 
141.     .section-alt {
142.         background-color: var(--color-bg-secondary);
143.     }
144. 
145.     .empty-state {
146.         text-align: center;
147.         padding: var(--spacing-12);
148.         background-color: var(--color-bg-secondary);
149.         border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
150.         color: var(--color-text-secondary);
151.     }
152. 
153.     .year-section {
154.         margin-bottom: var(--spacing-10);
155.     }
156. 
157.     .year-heading {
158.         font-size: var(--font-size-2xl);
159.         color: var(--color-primary);
160.         margin-bottom: var(--spacing-4);
161.         padding-bottom: var(--spacing-2);
162.         border-bottom: 2px solid var(--color-primary);
163.     }
164. 
165.     .events-table {
166.         overflow-x: auto;
167.     }
168. 
169.     .events-table table {
170.         width: 100%;
171.         border-collapse: collapse;
172.     }
173. 
174.     .events-table th {
175.         text-align: left;
176.         padding: var(--spacing-3) var(--spacing-4);
177.         background-color: var(--color-bg-primary);
178.         font-weight: var(--font-weight-semibold);
179.         border-bottom: 2px solid var(--color-border);
180.     }
181. 
182.     .events-table td {
183.         padding: var(--spacing-3) var(--spacing-4);
184.         border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border-light);
185.     }
186. 
187.     .events-table tbody tr:hover {
188.         background-color: var(--color-bg-primary);
189.     }
190. 
191.     .date-col {
192.         white-space: nowrap;
193.         width: 180px;
194.         color: var(--color-text-secondary);
195.     }
196. 
197.     .event-col a {
198.         color: var(--color-text-primary);
199.         font-weight: var(--font-weight-medium);
200.         text-decoration: none;
201.     }
202. 
203.     .event-col a:hover {
204.         color: var(--color-primary);
205.     }
206. 
207.     .location-col {
208.         color: var(--color-text-secondary);
209.     }
210. 
211.     @media (max-width: 768px) {
212.         .events-table th:nth-child(3),
213.         .events-table td:nth-child(3) {
214.             display: none;
215.         }
216.     }
217. </style>
```

```
2. import BaseLayout from '../../layouts/BaseLayout.astro';
3. import Badge from '../../components/ui/Badge.astro';
4. import Button from '../../components/ui/Button.astro';
5. import TabNav from '../../components/ui/TabNav.astro';
6. import TabSyncScript from '../../components/ui/TabSyncScript.astro';
7. import PresentationCard from '../../components/cards/PresentationCard.astro';
8. import { getCollection, render } from 'astro:content';
9. 
10. export async function getStaticPaths() {
11.     const events = await getCollection('events');
12.     return events.map((event) => ({
13.         params: { slug: event.id },
14.         props: { event },
15.     }));
16. }
17. 
18. const { event } = Astro.props;
19. const { Content } = await render(event);
20. 
21. // Get linked presentations with their event-specific details
22. let linkedPresentations: any[] = [];
23. if (event.data.presentations?.length) {
24.     const [allPresentations, allEngagementPresentations] = await Promise.all([
25.         getCollection('presentations'),
26.         getCollection('engagementPresentations'),
27.     ]);
28. 
29.     const sessionSlugByPresentationId = new Map(
30.         allEngagementPresentations
31.             .filter((entry) => entry.data.eventSlug === event.id)
32.             .map((entry) => [entry.data.presentationSlug, entry.data.sessionSlug])
33.     );
34.     
35.     linkedPresentations = event.data.presentations.map((p: any) => {
36.         // Handle both string format (old) and object format (new)
37.         const presentationId = typeof p === 'string' ? p : p.id;
38.         const presentationData = allPresentations.find(pres => pres.id === presentationId);
39.         
40.         if (!presentationData) return null;
41.         
42.         // Add event-specific scheduling details
43.         const sessionSlug = sessionSlugByPresentationId.get(presentationId);
44. 
45.         return {
46.             ...presentationData,
47.             detailsHref: sessionSlug
48.                 ? `/speaking/${event.id}/presentations/${sessionSlug}`
49.                 : `/presentations/${presentationId}`,
50.             sessionName: typeof p === 'object' ? p.sessionName : undefined,
51.             scheduleDate: typeof p === 'object' ? p.date : undefined,
52.             scheduleTime: typeof p === 'object' ? p.time : undefined,
53.             scheduleTimeZone: typeof p === 'object' ? p.timeZone : undefined,
54.             scheduleRoom: typeof p === 'object' ? p.room : undefined,
55.             sessionUrl: typeof p === 'object' ? p.sessionUrl : undefined,
56.         };
57.     }).filter(Boolean);
58. }
59. 
60. function formatDateRange(start: Date, end?: Date): string {
61.     const utc = { timeZone: 'UTC' as const };
62.     if (!end || start.getTime() === end.getTime()) {
63.         return start.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { 
64.             weekday: 'long',
65.             month: 'long', 
66.             day: 'numeric', 
67.             year: 'numeric',
68.             ...utc
69.         });
70.     }
71.     const sameMonth = start.getUTCMonth() === end.getUTCMonth() && start.getUTCFullYear() === end.getUTCFullYear();
72.     if (sameMonth) {
73.         return `${start.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'long', day: 'numeric', ...utc })} - ${end.getUTCDate()}, ${end.getUTCFullYear()}`;
74.     }
75.     return `${start.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'long', day: 'numeric', ...utc })} - ${end.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'long', day: 'numeric', year: 'numeric', ...utc })}`;
76. }
77. 
78. function formatLocation(loc: any): string {
79.     if (loc.virtual) return 'Virtual Event';
80.     const parts = [];
81.     if (loc.venue) parts.push(loc.venue);
82.     parts.push(loc.city);
83.     if (loc.state) parts.push(loc.state);
84.     parts.push(loc.country);
85.     return parts.join(', ');
86. }
87. 
88. // Determine if event is upcoming based on start date
89. const now = new Date();
90. const isUpcoming = event.data.startDate >= now;
91. 
92. const tabs = [
93.     { id: 'about', label: 'About' },
94.     { id: 'presentations', label: `My Presentations (${linkedPresentations.length})` },
95. ];
96. 
97. // Get current tab from URL
98. const currentTab = Astro.url.searchParams.get('tab') || 'about';
99. 
100. const typeLabels: Record<string, string> = {
101.     'conference': 'Conference',
102.     'meetup': 'Meetup',
103.     'webinar': 'Webinar',
104.     'podcast': 'Podcast',
105.     'workshop': 'Workshop',
106.     'user-group': 'User Group',
107.     'corporate': 'Corporate Event',
108.     'other': 'Event',
109. };

112. <BaseLayout 
113.     title={event.data.title}
114.     description={event.data.description || `Speaking engagement at ${event.data.title}`}
115.     ogImage={event.data.heroImage}
116. >
117.     <section class="event-header">
118.         <div class="container">
119.             <div class="header-content">

121.                     <img 
122.                         src={event.data.heroImage || '/images/events/default-event.svg'}

124.                     />
125.                 </div>

137.                     </div>

172.             />
173.         </div>

183.                 </div>

189.                         </Button>
190.                     </div>
191.                 )}
192. 
193.                 {event.data.photos && event.data.photos.length > 0 && (
194.                     <div class="photos-section">
195.                         <h2>Photos</h2>
196.                         <div class="photos-grid">
197.                             {event.data.photos.map((photo: string) => (
198.                                 <div class="photo-item">
199.                                     <img src={photo} alt="Event photo" loading="lazy" />
200.                                 </div>
201.                             ))}
202.                         </div>
203.                     </div>
204.                 )}
205.             </div>
206. 
207.             <!-- Presentations Tab -->
208.             <div class="tab-panel" data-tab="presentations" style={currentTab !== 'presentations' ? 'display: none;' : ''}>
209.                 {linkedPresentations.length > 0 ? (
210.                     <div class="presentations-list">
211.                         <h2>My Sessions at This Event</h2>
212.                         <div class="grid grid-3">
213.                             {linkedPresentations.map((presentation) => (
214.                                 <PresentationCard
215.                                     title={presentation.data.title}
216.                                     description={presentation.data.description}
217.                                     slug={presentation.id}
218.                                     detailsHref={presentation.detailsHref}
219.                                     thumbnail={presentation.data.heroImage}
220.                                     presentationType={presentation.data.type}
221.                                     tags={presentation.data.tags}
222.                                     showSchedule={true}
223.                                     sessionName={presentation.sessionName}
224.                                     scheduleDate={presentation.scheduleDate}
225.                                     scheduleTime={presentation.scheduleTime}

229.                                 />
230.                             ))}
231.                         </div>
232.                     </div>

236.                     </div>
237.                 )}
238.             </div>
239.         </div>
240.     </section>

414. <script>
415.     // Client-side tab switching
416.     document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
417.         const tabLinks = document.querySelectorAll('.tab-item');
418.         const tabPanels = document.querySelectorAll('.tab-panel');
419.         
420.         tabLinks.forEach(link => {
421.             link.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
422.                 e.preventDefault();
423.                 const targetTab = link.getAttribute('data-tab');
424.                 
425.                 // Update active tab styling
426.                 tabLinks.forEach(l => l.classList.remove('tab-active'));
427.                 link.classList.add('tab-active');
428.                 
429.                 // Show/hide panels
430.                 tabPanels.forEach(panel => {
431.                     if (panel.getAttribute('data-tab') === targetTab) {
432.                         panel.style.display = '';
433.                     } else {
434.                         panel.style.display = 'none';
435.                     }
436.                 });
437.                 
438.                 // Update URL without reload
439.                 const url = new URL(window.location.href);
440.                 url.searchParams.set('tab', targetTab);
441.                 window.history.pushState({}, '', url);
442.             });
443.         });
444.     });
445. </script>
446.
```

```
1. ---
2. import BaseLayout from '../../../layouts/BaseLayout.astro';
3. import { getCollection } from 'astro:content';
4. 
5. export async function getStaticPaths() {
6.     const events = await getCollection('events');
7. 
8.     return events.map((event) => ({
9.         params: { eventSlug: event.id },
10.         props: {
11.             targetPath: `/speaking/${event.id}?tab=presentations`,
12.             eventTitle: event.data.title,
13.         },
14.     }));
15. }
16. 
17. const { targetPath, eventTitle } = Astro.props;
18. ---
19. 
20. <BaseLayout
21.     title={`${eventTitle} Presentations`}
22.     description={`Redirecting to the presentations tab for ${eventTitle}.`}
23.     canonicalUrl={new URL(targetPath, Astro.url.origin).toString()}
24. >
25.     <section class="section">
26.         <div class="container redirect-page">
27.             <h1>Redirecting...</h1>
28.             <p>If you are not redirected automatically, continue to <a id="redirect-link" href={targetPath}>presentations for this event</a>.</p>
29.         </div>
30.     </section>
31. 
32.     <script is:inline>
33.         const redirectLink = document.getElementById('redirect-link');
34.         if (redirectLink instanceof HTMLAnchorElement) {
35.             window.location.replace(redirectLink.href);
36.         }
37.     </script>
38. </BaseLayout>
39. 
40. <style>
41.     .redirect-page {
42.         text-align: center;
43.         max-width: 760px;
44.     }
45. </style>
46.
```

```
1. ---
2. import { getCollection } from 'astro:content';
3. import EngagementPresentationPage from '@/components/presentations/EngagementPresentationPage.astro';
4. import { getCanonicalPath } from '@/lib/engagementPresentations';
5. 
6. export async function getStaticPaths() {
7.     const engagementPresentations = await getCollection('engagementPresentations');
8. 
9.     return engagementPresentations.map((engagement) => ({
10.         params: {
11.             eventSlug: engagement.data.eventSlug,
12.             sessionSlug: engagement.data.sessionSlug,
13.         },
14.         props: { engagement },
15.     }));
16. }
17. 
18. const { engagement } = Astro.props;
19. 
20. const [events, presentations] = await Promise.all([
21.     getCollection('events'),
22.     getCollection('presentations'),
23. ]);
24. 
25. const event = events.find((entry) => entry.id === engagement.data.eventSlug);
26. const presentation = presentations.find((entry) => entry.id === engagement.data.presentationSlug);
27. 
28. const canonicalPath = getCanonicalPath(engagement);
29. const canonicalUrl = new URL(canonicalPath, Astro.url.origin).toString();
30. ---
31. 
32. <EngagementPresentationPage
33.     engagement={engagement}
34.     event={event}
35.     presentation={presentation}
36.     canonicalUrl={canonicalUrl}
37. />
38.
```

</details>

```
16. 
17. // Get recent blog posts
```

```
2. import BaseLayout from '../../layouts/BaseLayout.astro';
3. import PageHeader from '../../components/ui/PageHeader.astro';
4. import BlogCard from '../../components/cards/BlogCard.astro';
5. import { getCollection } from 'astro:content';
6. 
7. // Get all published blog posts
8. let posts: any[] = [];
9. try {
10.     posts = await getCollection('blog', ({ data }) => !data.draft);
11.     posts = posts.sort((a, b) => b.data.pubDate.getTime() - a.data.pubDate.getTime());
12. } catch (e) {
13.     // Collection might not exist yet
14. }
15. 
16. // Get all categories and tags
17. const categories = [...new Set(posts.map(p => p.data.category))];
18. ---
19. 
20. <BaseLayout 
21.     title="Blog" 
22.     description="Articles and thoughts on technology, speaking, community, and more by Chad Green."
23. >
24.     <PageHeader title="Blog">
25.         <p>Thoughts on technology, speaking, and community</p>
26.     </PageHeader>
27. 
28.     <section class="section">
29.         <div class="container">
30.             <!-- Category Filter -->
31.             {categories.length > 1 && (
32.                 <div class="filter-controls">
33.                     <button class="filter-btn active" data-filter="all">All</button>
34.                     {categories.map((category) => (
35.                         <button class="filter-btn" data-filter={category}>{category}</button>
36.                     ))}
37.                 </div>
38.             )}
39. 
40.             {posts.length > 0 ? (
41.                 <div class="blog-grid grid grid-3" id="blog-grid">
42.                     {posts.map((post) => (
43.                         <div class="blog-item" data-category={post.data.category}>
44.                             <BlogCard
45.                                 title={post.data.title}
46.                                 description={post.data.description}
47.                                 slug={post.id}
48.                                 pubDate={post.data.pubDate}
49.                                 heroImage={post.data.heroImage}
50.                                 category={post.data.category}
51.                                 tags={post.data.tags}
52.                                 featured={post.data.featured}
53.                             />
54.                         </div>
55.                     ))}
56.                 </div>
57.             ) : (
58.                 <div class="empty-state">
59.                     <h3>No Blog Posts Yet</h3>
60.                     <p>Check back soon for articles and insights.</p>
61.                 </div>
62.             )}
63.         </div>
64.     </section>
65. </BaseLayout>
66. 
67. <style>
68.     .filter-controls {
69.         display: flex;
70.         flex-wrap: wrap;
71.         gap: var(--spacing-2);
72.         margin-bottom: var(--spacing-8);
73.         justify-content: center;
74.     }
75. 
76.     .filter-btn {
77.         padding: var(--spacing-2) var(--spacing-4);
78.         background-color: var(--color-bg-secondary);
79.         border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
80.         border-radius: var(--radius-full);
81.         font-size: var(--font-size-sm);
82.         font-weight: var(--font-weight-medium);
83.         color: var(--color-text-secondary);
84.         cursor: pointer;
85.         transition: all var(--transition-fast);
86.     }
87. 
88.     .filter-btn:hover {
89.         border-color: var(--color-primary);
90.         color: var(--color-primary);
91.     }
92. 
93.     .filter-btn.active {
94.         background-color: var(--color-primary);
95.         border-color: var(--color-primary);
96.         color: var(--color-text-inverse);
97.     }
98. 
99.     .blog-item {
100.         transition: opacity var(--transition-fast);
101.     }
102. 
103.     .blog-item.hidden {
104.         display: none;
105.     }
106. 
107.     .empty-state {
108.         text-align: center;
109.         padding: var(--spacing-16);
110.         background-color: var(--color-bg-secondary);
111.         border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
112.     }
113. 
114.     .empty-state h3 {
115.         margin-bottom: var(--spacing-2);
116.     }
117. 
118.     .empty-state p {
119.         color: var(--color-text-secondary);
120.         margin-bottom: 0;
121.     }
122. </style>
123. 
124. <script>
125.     const filterBtns = document.querySelectorAll('.filter-btn');
126.     const items = document.querySelectorAll('.blog-item');
127. 
128.     filterBtns.forEach(btn => {
129.         btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
130.             const filter = (btn as HTMLElement).dataset.filter;
131. 
132.             // Update active state
133.             filterBtns.forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
134.             btn.classList.add('active');
135. 
136.             // Filter items
137.             items.forEach(item => {
138.                 const category = (item as HTMLElement).dataset.category;
139.                 if (filter === 'all' || category === filter) {
140.                     item.classList.remove('hidden');
141.                 } else {
142.                     item.classList.add('hidden');
143.                 }
144.             });
145.         });
146.     });
147. </script>
148.
```

```
1. ---
2. import SidebarLayout from '../layouts/SidebarLayout.astro';
3. import Button from '../components/ui/Button.astro';
4. 
5. // About page data - could later come from a content collection
6. const about = {
7.     name: 'Chad Green',
8.     tagline: 'Sr. Systems Architect at Jasper Engines • Cloud Tech Leader • Microsoft MVP • Speaker & Innovator • USMC Vet • Lego Builder',
9.     avatar: '/images/profile/chad-green.svg',
10.     bio: `
11. 
12.         <p>Chad Green is a veteran technologist, speaker, and systems architect with more than three decades of experience helping organizations build software that lasts. As a Senior Systems Architect at Jasper Engines & Transmissions, he leads the transformation of legacy systems into cloud‑native, event‑driven platforms, always with an eye toward governance, clarity, and long‑term sustainability.</p>
13. 
14.         <p>Chad is recognized as a Microsoft MVP and a passionate community builder. He speaks at conferences and user groups around the world, where he’s known for turning complex architectural concepts into practical, approachable guidance. His talks often draw from real‑world experience across industries, including automotive, healthcare, education, and government.</p>
15. 
16.         <p>He also invests heavily in the developer community by organizing conferences and meetups that bring people together to learn, collaborate, and elevate their craft.</p>
17. 
18.         <p>Beyond his professional work, Chad is a proud husband, father, and United States Marine Corps veteran. When he’s off the clock, you’ll likely find him designing new additions to his growing LEGO city because creativity, after all, is just another form of architecture.</p>
19. 
20.     `,
21.     email: 'chadgreen@chadgreen.com',
22.     social: {
23.         twitter: 'https://twitter.com/chadgreen',
24.         bluesky: 'https://bsky.app/profile/chadgreen.bsky.social',

27.         youtube: 'https://www.youtube.com/@TaleLearnCode',
28.         sessionize: 'https://sessionize.com/chad-green/',
29.     }
30. };
```

```
1. ---
2. import BaseLayout from '../../layouts/BaseLayout.astro';
3. import Badge from '../ui/Badge.astro';
4. import Button from '../ui/Button.astro';
5. import { render, type CollectionEntry } from 'astro:content';
6. import { getResourceIcon } from '@/lib/engagementPresentations';
7. 
8. export interface Props {
9.     engagement: CollectionEntry<'engagementPresentations'>;
10.     event?: CollectionEntry<'events'>;
11.     presentation?: CollectionEntry<'presentations'>;
12.     canonicalUrl: string;
13. }
14. 
15. const { engagement, event, presentation, canonicalUrl } = Astro.props;
16. const { Content } = await render(engagement);
17. 
18. const displayTitle = engagement.data.sessionTitle || engagement.data.title;
19. const eventTitle = event?.data.title || engagement.data.eventSlug;
20. const presentationTitle = presentation?.data.title || engagement.data.presentationSlug;
21. const sessionImage = engagement.data.thumbnail || engagement.data.heroImage || presentation?.data.heroImage || '/images/presentations/default-thumbnail.svg';
22. const resourceLinks = engagement.data.links.length > 0
23.     ? engagement.data.links
24.     : (presentation?.data.resources || []);
25. ---
26. 
27. <BaseLayout
28.     title={displayTitle}
29.     description={engagement.data.description}
30.     ogImage={engagement.data.heroImage || presentation?.data.heroImage}
31.     canonicalUrl={canonicalUrl}
32. >
33.     <section class="session-header">
34.         <div class="container">
35.             <div class="header-content">
36.                 <div class="header-image">
37.                     <img
38.                         src={sessionImage}
39.                         alt={`${displayTitle} thumbnail`}
40.                         loading="eager"
41.                     />
42.                 </div>
43.                 <div class="header-info">
44.                     <div class="header-meta">
45.                         <Badge variant="primary">Engagement Presentation</Badge>
46.                         <Badge variant="secondary">{eventTitle}</Badge>
47.                     </div>
48. 
49.                     <h1 class="session-title">{displayTitle}</h1>
50.                     <p class="session-description">{engagement.data.description}</p>
51. 
52.                     <div class="session-details">
53.                         {engagement.data.date && (
54.                             <div class="detail-item">
55.                                 <span>📅</span>
56.                                 <span>{engagement.data.date.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'long', day: 'numeric', year: 'numeric', timeZone: 'UTC' })}</span>
57.                             </div>
58.                         )}
59.                         {(engagement.data.time || engagement.data.timeZone) && (
60.                             <div class="detail-item">
61.                                 <span>🕐</span>
62.                                 <span>{engagement.data.time || 'TBA'}{engagement.data.timeZone ? ` ${engagement.data.timeZone}` : ''}</span>
63.                             </div>
64.                         )}
65.                         {engagement.data.room && (
66.                             <div class="detail-item">
67.                                 <span>📍</span>
68.                                 <span>{engagement.data.room}</span>
69.                             </div>
70.                         )}
71.                     </div>
72. 
73.                     <div class="header-actions">
74.                         <Button href={`/speaking/${engagement.data.eventSlug}`} variant="outline">Event Details</Button>
75.                         <Button href={`/presentations/${engagement.data.presentationSlug}`} variant="outline">Base Presentation</Button>
76.                         {engagement.data.sessionUrl && (
77.                             <Button href={engagement.data.sessionUrl} variant="primary" external>Session Listing</Button>
78.                         )}
79.                     </div>
80.                 </div>
81.             </div>
82.         </div>
83.     </section>
84. 
85.     <section class="section">
86.         <div class="container">
87.             <div class="content-grid">
88.                 <article class="session-content prose">
89.                     <Content />
90.                 </article>
91. 
92.                 <aside class="session-sidebar">
93.                     <div class="sidebar-card">
94.                         <h2>Session Info</h2>
95.                         <p><strong>Event:</strong> <a href={`/speaking/${engagement.data.eventSlug}`}>{eventTitle}</a></p>
96.                         <p><strong>Presentation:</strong> <a href={`/presentations/${engagement.data.presentationSlug}`}>{presentationTitle}</a></p>
97.                     </div>
98.                 </aside>
99.             </div>
100.         </div>
101.     </section>
102. 
103.     <section class="section section-alt">
104.         <div class="container">
105.             <h2>Session Resources</h2>
106.             {resourceLinks.length > 0 ? (
107.                 <div class="resources-grid">
108.                     {resourceLinks.map((resource: any) => (
109.                         <a href={resource.url} target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="resource-card">
110.                             <span class="resource-icon">{getResourceIcon(resource.type)}</span>
111.                             <span class="resource-title">{resource.title}</span>
112.                             {resource.description && <span class="resource-description">{resource.description}</span>}
113.                         </a>
114.                     ))}
115.                 </div>
116.             ) : (
117.                 <p class="resources-empty">Resources will be added soon.</p>
118.             )}
119.         </div>
120.     </section>
121. </BaseLayout>
122. 
123. <style>
124.     .session-header {
125.         background-color: var(--color-bg-secondary);
126.         padding: var(--spacing-10) 0;
127.     }
128. 
129.     .header-content {
130.         display: grid;
131.         grid-template-columns: 350px 1fr;
132.         gap: var(--spacing-8);
133.         align-items: start;
134.     }
135. 
136.     .header-image {
137.         border-radius: var(--radius-lg);

140.     }

145.     }

148.         display: flex;

150.         gap: var(--spacing-2);
151.         margin-bottom: var(--spacing-4);
152.     }
153.

155.         margin-bottom: var(--spacing-3);
156.         line-height: 1.2;
157.     }
158.

160.         font-size: var(--font-size-lg);
161.         color: var(--color-text-secondary);
162.         margin-bottom: var(--spacing-5);
163.     }
164.

166.         display: flex;

169.         margin-bottom: var(--spacing-5);
170.     }
171. 
172.     .detail-item {
173.         display: inline-flex;
174.         align-items: center;
175.         gap: var(--spacing-2);
176.         color: var(--color-text-secondary);
177.         font-size: var(--font-size-sm);
178.     }
179. 
180.     .header-actions {
181.         display: flex;
182.         flex-wrap: wrap;
183.         gap: var(--spacing-2);
184.     }
185. 
186.     .content-grid {
187.         display: grid;
188.         grid-template-columns: 2fr 1fr;
189.         gap: var(--spacing-8);
190.     }
191. 
192.     .sidebar-card {
193.         background-color: var(--color-bg-secondary);
194.         border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
195.         padding: var(--spacing-5);
196.     }
197. 
198.     .sidebar-card h2 {
199.         margin-bottom: var(--spacing-3);
200.         font-size: var(--font-size-xl);
201.     }
202. 
203.     .sidebar-card p {
204.         margin-bottom: var(--spacing-2);
205.     }
206. 
207.     .section-alt {
208.         background-color: var(--color-bg-secondary);
209.     }
210. 
211.     .resources-grid {
212.         display: grid;
213.         grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(240px, 1fr));
214.         gap: var(--spacing-4);
215.         margin-top: var(--spacing-4);
216.     }
217. 
218.     .resource-card {
219.         display: flex;

221.         gap: var(--spacing-2);
222.         text-decoration: none;
223.         color: inherit;
224.         background-color: var(--color-bg-primary);
225.         border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
226.         border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
227.         padding: var(--spacing-4);
228.         transition: all var(--transition-fast);
229.     }
230. 
231.     .resource-card:hover {

234.     }
235. 
236.     .resource-icon {
237.         font-size: var(--font-size-2xl);
238.     }
239.

241.         font-weight: var(--font-weight-semibold);
242.     }
```

```
2. import BaseLayout from '../../layouts/BaseLayout.astro';
3. import PageHeader from '../../components/ui/PageHeader.astro';
4. import MeetupCard from '../../components/cards/MeetupCard.astro';
5. import { getCollection } from 'astro:content';
6. 
7. // Get all meetup groups
8. const meetupGroups = await getCollection('meetupGroups');
9. ---
10. 
11. <BaseLayout 
12.     title="Meetups" 
13.     description="Community meetups and user groups organized or co-organized by Chad Green."
14. >
15.     <PageHeader title="Meetups">
16.         <p>Community groups I organize and participate in</p>
17.     </PageHeader>
18. 
19.     <section class="section">
20.         <div class="container">
21.             {meetupGroups.length > 0 ? (
22.                 <div class="meetups-grid grid grid-3">
23.                     {meetupGroups.map((group) => (
24.                         <MeetupCard
25.                             name={group.data.title}
26.                             slug={group.data.slug}
27.                             shortDescription={group.data.description}
28.                             thumbnail={group.data.heroImage}
29.                             city={group.data.city}
30.                             role={group.data.role}
31.                             meetupUrl={group.data.website}
32.                         />
33.                     ))}
34.                 </div>
35.             ) : (
36.                 <div class="empty-state">
37.                     <h3>No Meetups Yet</h3>
38.                     <p>Check back soon for community groups I'm involved with.</p>
39.                 </div>
40.             )}
41.         </div>
42.     </section>
43. </BaseLayout>
44. 
45. <style>
46.     .empty-state {
47.         text-align: center;
48.         padding: var(--spacing-16);
49.         background-color: var(--color-bg-secondary);
50.         border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
51.     }
52. 
53.     .empty-state h3 {
54.         margin-bottom: var(--spacing-2);
55.     }
56. 
57.     .empty-state p {
58.         color: var(--color-text-secondary);
59.         margin-bottom: 0;
60.     }
61. </style>
62.
```

```
2. import BaseLayout from '../../../layouts/BaseLayout.astro';
3. import Badge from '../../../components/ui/Badge.astro';
4. import Button from '../../../components/ui/Button.astro';
5. import TabNav from '../../../components/ui/TabNav.astro';
6. import TabSyncScript from '../../../components/ui/TabSyncScript.astro';

9. 
10. export async function getStaticPaths() {
11.     const groups = await getCollection('meetupGroups');
12.     return groups.map((group) => ({
13.         params: { groupSlug: group.data.slug },
14.         props: { group },
15.     }));
16. }
17. 
18. const { group } = Astro.props;
19. const { Content } = await render(group);
20. 
21. // Get all events for this group
22. let allEvents: any[] = [];
23. let upcomingEvents: any[] = [];
24. let pastEvents: any[] = [];
25. try {
26.     const allMeetupEvents = await getCollection('meetupEvents');
27.     const now = new Date();
28.     allEvents = allMeetupEvents
29.         .filter(e => e.data.meetupGroup === group.data.slug)
30.         .sort((a, b) => b.data.date.getTime() - a.data.date.getTime());
31.     
32.     upcomingEvents = allEvents.filter(e => e.data.date >= now).slice(0, 5);
33.     pastEvents = allEvents.filter(e => e.data.date < now).slice(0, 10);
34. } catch (e) {
35.     // Collection might not exist yet
36. }
37. 
38. const tabs = [
39.     { id: 'details', label: 'Meetup Details' },
40.     { id: 'events', label: `Events (${allEvents.length})` },
41. ];
42. 
43. const currentTab = Astro.url.searchParams.get('tab') || 'details';
44. 
45. const roleLabels: Record<string, string> = {
46.     'organizer': 'Organizer',
47.     'co-organizer': 'Co-Organizer',
48.     'speaker': 'Speaker',
49.     'member': 'Member',
50. };
51. ---
52. 
53. <BaseLayout 
54.     title={group.data.title}
55.     description={group.data.description}
56.     ogImage={group.data.heroImage}
57. >
58.     <section class="meetup-header">
59.         <div class="container">
60.             <div class="header-content">
61.                 <div class="meetup-logo">
62.                     <img 
63.                         src={group.data.heroImage || '/images/meetups/default-meetup.svg'} 
64.                         alt={`${group.data.title} logo`}
65.                     />
66.                 </div>
67.                 <div class="meetup-info">
68.                     {group.data.role && (
69.                         <div class="meetup-meta">
70.                             <Badge variant="primary">{group.data.role}</Badge>
71.                         </div>
72.                     )}
73.                     
74.                     <h1 class="meetup-title">{group.data.title}</h1>
75.                     
76.                     <div class="meetup-details">
77.                         <div class="detail-item">
78.                             <span class="detail-icon">📍</span>
79.                             <span class="detail-text">{group.data.city}, {group.data.state || ''} {group.data.country}</span>
80.                         </div>
81.                     </div>
82. 
83.                     <p class="meetup-description">{group.data.description}</p>
84. 
85.                     <div class="meetup-actions">
86.                         {group.data.website && (
87.                             <Button href={group.data.website} variant="primary">
88.                                 View on Meetup.com ↗
89.                             </Button>
90.                         )}
91.                     </div>
92.                 </div>
93.             </div>
94.         </div>
95.     </section>
96. 
97.     <!-- Tab Navigation -->
98.     <div class="tabs-container">
99.         <div class="container">
100.             <TabNav 
101.                 tabs={tabs.map(t => ({ ...t, href: `?tab=${t.id}` }))} 
102.                 activeTab={currentTab} 
103.             />
104.         </div>
105.     </div>
106. 
107.     <!-- Tab Content -->
108.     <section class="section tab-content">
109.         <div class="container">
110.             <!-- Details Tab -->
111.             <div class="tab-panel" id="tab-details" data-tab="details" style={currentTab !== 'details' ? 'display: none;' : ''}>
112.                 <div class="meetup-content">
113.                     <Content />
114.                 </div>
115.             </div>
116. 
117.             <!-- Events Tab -->
118.             <div class="tab-panel" id="tab-events" data-tab="events" style={currentTab !== 'events' ? 'display: none;' : ''}>
119.                 {allEvents.length > 0 ? (
120.                     <div class="events-section">
121.                         {upcomingEvents.length > 0 && (
122.                             <div class="upcoming-events">
123.                                 <h3>Upcoming Events</h3>
124.                                 <div class="events-list">
125.                                     {upcomingEvents.map((event) => (
126.                                         <MeetupEventCard
127.                                             title={event.data.title}
128.                                             date={event.data.date}
129.                                             shortDescription={event.data.shortDescription || event.data.description}
130.                                             eventUrl={event.data.eventUrl}
131.                                             thumbnail={event.data.thumbnail}
132.                                             meetupGroup={group.data.slug}
133.                                             eventSlug={event.id}
134.                                         />
135.                                     ))}
136.                                 </div>
137.                             </div>
138.                         )}
139. 
140.                         {pastEvents.length > 0 && (
141.                             <div class="past-events">
142.                                 <h3>Past Events</h3>
143.                                 <div class="events-list">
144.                                     {pastEvents.map((event) => (
145.                                         <MeetupEventCard
146.                                             title={event.data.title}
147.                                             date={event.data.date}
148.                                             shortDescription={event.data.shortDescription || event.data.description}
149.                                             eventUrl={event.data.eventUrl}
150.                                             thumbnail={event.data.thumbnail}
151.                                             meetupGroup={group.data.slug}
152.                                             eventSlug={event.id}
153.                                         />
154.                                     ))}
155.                                 </div>
156.                             </div>
157.                         )}
158.                     </div>
159.                 ) : (
160.                     <div class="empty-state">
161.                         <p>No events listed yet. Check the Meetup page for the latest information.</p>
162.                         {group.data.website && (
163.                             <Button href={group.data.website} variant="primary">
164.                                 View on Meetup.com ↗
165.                             </Button>
166.                         )}
167.                     </div>
168.                 )}
169.             </div>
170.         </div>
171.     </section>
172. 
173.     <TabSyncScript />
174. 
175.     <style>
176.         .tabs-container {
177.             background-color: var(--color-bg-secondary);
178.             border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border);
179.             position: sticky;
180.             top: 0;
181.             z-index: 10;
182.         }
183. 
184.         .tab-panel {
185.             animation: fadeIn 0.2s ease-in-out;
186.         }
187. 
188.         @keyframes fadeIn {
189.             from {
190.                 opacity: 0;
191.             }
192.             to {
193.                 opacity: 1;
194.             }
195.         }
196. 
197.         .events-section {
198.             display: flex;
199.             flex-direction: column;
200.             gap: var(--spacing-10);
201.         }
202. 
203.         .upcoming-events,
204.         .past-events {
205.             display: flex;
206.             flex-direction: column;
207.             gap: var(--spacing-4);
208.         }
209. 
210.         .upcoming-events h3,
211.         .past-events h3 {
212.             font-size: var(--font-size-2xl);
213.             margin-bottom: var(--spacing-4);
214.         }
215. 
216.         .events-list {
217.             display: flex;
218.             flex-direction: column;
219.             gap: var(--spacing-4);
220.             max-width: 800px;
221.         }
222. 
223.         .empty-state {
224.             text-align: center;
225.             padding: var(--spacing-10);
226.             background-color: var(--color-bg-secondary);
227.             border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
228.         }
229. 
230.         .empty-state p {
231.             color: var(--color-text-secondary);
232.             margin-bottom: var(--spacing-4);
233.         }
234. 
235.         .meetup-header {
236.             background-color: var(--color-bg-secondary);
237.             padding: var(--spacing-10) 0;
238.         }
239. 
240.         .header-content {
241.             display: grid;
242.             grid-template-columns: 180px 1fr;
243.             gap: var(--spacing-8);
244.             align-items: start;
245.         }
246. 
247.         .meetup-logo {
248.             background-color: var(--color-bg-primary);
249.             border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
250.             padding: var(--spacing-4);
251.             box-shadow: var(--shadow-md);
252.         }
253. 
254.         .meetup-logo img {
255.             width: 100%;
256.             height: auto;
257.             object-fit: contain;
258.         }
259. 
260.         .meetup-meta {
261.             margin-bottom: var(--spacing-3);
262.         }
263. 
264.         .meetup-title {
265.             font-size: var(--font-size-4xl);
266.             margin-bottom: var(--spacing-4);
267.             line-height: 1.2;
268.         }
269. 
270.         .meetup-details {
271.             margin-bottom: var(--spacing-4);
272.         }
273. 
274.         .detail-item {
275.             display: flex;
276.             align-items: center;
277.             gap: var(--spacing-2);
278.             margin-bottom: var(--spacing-2);
279.         }
280. 
281.         .detail-icon {
282.             font-size: 1.25rem;
283.         }
284. 
285.         .detail-text {
286.             color: var(--color-text-secondary);
287.         }
288. 
289.         .meetup-description {
290.             font-size: var(--font-size-lg);
291.             color: var(--color-text-secondary);
292.             margin-bottom: var(--spacing-6);
293.             max-width: 700px;
294.         }
295. 
296.         .meetup-actions {
297.             display: flex;
298.             flex-wrap: wrap;
299.             gap: var(--spacing-3);
300.         }
301. 
302.         @media (max-width: 768px) {
303.             .header-content {
304.                 grid-template-columns: 1fr;
305.             }
306. 
307.             .meetup-logo {
308.                 max-width: 150px;
309.             }
310. 
311.             .meetup-title {
312.                 font-size: var(--font-size-3xl);
313.             }
314.         }
315.     </style>
316. </BaseLayout>
317.
```

</details>

```
1. ---
2. import BaseLayout from '../../../layouts/BaseLayout.astro';
3. import PageHeader from '../../../components/ui/PageHeader.astro';
4. import PresentationCard from '../../../components/cards/PresentationCard.astro';
5. import { getCollection } from 'astro:content';
6. 
7. export async function getStaticPaths() {
8.     const presentations = await getCollection('presentations');
9.     
10.     // Get all unique tags
11.     const allTags = new Set<string>();
12.     presentations.forEach(presentation => {
13.         presentation.data.tags?.forEach(tag => allTags.add(tag));
14.     });
15. 
16.     return Array.from(allTags).map(tag => ({
17.         params: { tag },
18.         props: {
19.             tag,
20.             presentations: presentations.filter(p => p.data.tags?.includes(tag))
21.                 .sort((a, b) => a.data.title.localeCompare(b.data.title))
22.         }
23.     }));
24. }
25. 
26. const { tag, presentations } = Astro.props;
27. ---
28. 
29. <BaseLayout 
30.     title={`Presentations tagged "${tag}"`}
31.     description={`All presentations tagged with ${tag}`}
32. >
33.     <PageHeader title={`Tag: #${tag}`}>
34.         <p>{presentations.length} presentation{presentations.length !== 1 ? 's' : ''} with this tag</p>
35.     </PageHeader>
36. 
37.     <section class="section">
38.         <div class="container">
39.             <div class="presentations-grid grid grid-3">
40.                 {presentations.map((presentation: any) => (
41.                     <PresentationCard
42.                         title={presentation.data.title}
43.                         description={presentation.data.description}
44.                         slug={presentation.id}
45.                         thumbnail={presentation.data.heroImage}
46.                         presentationType={presentation.data.type}
47.                         tags={presentation.data.tags}
48.                         featured={presentation.data.featured}
49.                     />
50.                 ))}
51.             </div>
52.             
53.             <div class="back-link">
54.                 <a href="/presentations">&larr; All Presentations</a>
55.             </div>
56.         </div>
57.     </section>
58. </BaseLayout>
59. 
60. <style>
61.     .back-link {
62.         margin-top: var(--spacing-8);
63.         text-align: center;
64.     }
65.     
66.     .back-link a {
67.         color: var(--color-primary);
68.         text-decoration: none;
69.         font-weight: 500;
70.     }
71.     
72.     .back-link a:hover {
73.         text-decoration: underline;
74.     }
75. </style>
76.
```

```
2. import BaseLayout from '../../../layouts/BaseLayout.astro';
3. import PageHeader from '../../../components/ui/PageHeader.astro';
4. import BlogCard from '../../../components/cards/BlogCard.astro';
5. import { getCollection } from 'astro:content';
6. 
7. export async function getStaticPaths() {
8.     const posts = await getCollection('blog', ({ data }) => !data.draft);
9.     
10.     // Get all unique tags
11.     const allTags = new Set<string>();
12.     posts.forEach(post => {
13.         post.data.tags?.forEach(tag => allTags.add(tag));
14.     });
15. 
16.     return Array.from(allTags).map(tag => ({
17.         params: { tag },
18.         props: {
19.             tag,
20.             posts: posts.filter(post => post.data.tags?.includes(tag))
21.                 .sort((a, b) => b.data.pubDate.getTime() - a.data.pubDate.getTime())
22.         }
23.     }));
24. }
25. 
26. const { tag, posts } = Astro.props;
27. ---
28. 
29. <BaseLayout 
30.     title={`Posts tagged "${tag}"`}
31.     description={`All blog posts tagged with ${tag}`}
32. >
33.     <PageHeader title={`Tag: #${tag}`}>
34.         <p>{posts.length} post{posts.length !== 1 ? 's' : ''} with this tag</p>
35.     </PageHeader>
36. 
37.     <section class="section">
38.         <div class="container">
39.             <div class="blog-grid grid grid-3">
40.                 {posts.map((post: any) => (
41.                     <BlogCard
42.                         title={post.data.title}
43.                         description={post.data.description}
44.                         slug={post.id}
45.                         pubDate={post.data.pubDate}
46.                         heroImage={post.data.heroImage}
47.                         category={post.data.category}
48.                         tags={post.data.tags}
49.                     />
50.                 ))}
51.             </div>
52.         </div>
53.     </section>
54. </BaseLayout>
55.
```

```
112.         <!-- Bio Section -->

114.             <Fragment set:html={about.bio} />
115.         </div>
116. 
117.         <!-- CTA Section -->
118.         <div class="cta-section">
119.             <h2>Let's Connect</h2>
120.             <p>Interested in having me speak at your event, or just want to say hello?</p>
121.             <div class="cta-buttons">
122.                 <Button href="/contact" variant="primary">Get in Touch</Button>
123.                 <Button href="/presentations" variant="outline">View My Presentations</Button>
124.             </div>
125.         </div>
126. 
127.         <!-- Gallery Section -->
128.         <div class="gallery-section">
129.             <h2>In Action</h2>
130.             <div class="gallery-slider" data-gallery>
131.                 <div class="gallery-track">
132.                     {galleryImages.map((image) => (
133.                         <div class="gallery-slide">
134.                             <img src={image.src} alt={image.alt} loading="lazy" />
135.                             <a href={image.src} download class="gallery-download" aria-label="Download image">
136.                                 <span class="download-icon">↓</span>
137.                             </a>
138.                         </div>
139.                     ))}
140.                 </div>
141.                 <button class="gallery-nav prev" type="button" aria-label="Previous image">Prev</button>
142.                 <button class="gallery-nav next" type="button" aria-label="Next image">Next</button>
143.                 <div class="gallery-dots">
144.                     {galleryImages.map((_, index) => (
145.                         <button
146.                             class="gallery-dot"
147.                             type="button"
148.                             aria-label={`Go to image ${index + 1}`}
149.                             data-dot={index}
150.                         ></button>
151.                     ))}
152.                 </div>
153.             </div>
154.         </div>
155.     </div>
156. </SidebarLayout>
157. 
158. <script>
159.     const slider = document.querySelector('[data-gallery]');
160.     if (slider) {
161.         const track = slider.querySelector('.gallery-track');
162.         const slides = Array.from(slider.querySelectorAll('.gallery-slide'));
163.         const dots = Array.from(slider.querySelectorAll('.gallery-dot'));
164.         const prevBtn = slider.querySelector('.gallery-nav.prev');
165.         const nextBtn = slider.querySelector('.gallery-nav.next');
166.         let index = 0;
167. 
168.         const update = () => {
169.             if (!track) return;
170.             track.style.transform = `translateX(-${index * 100}%)`;
171.             dots.forEach((dot, i) => dot.classList.toggle('active', i === index));
172.         };
173. 
174.         const goTo = (nextIndex) => {
175.             const total = slides.length;
176.             if (!total) return;
177.             index = (nextIndex + total) % total;
178.             update();
179.         };
180. 
181.         prevBtn?.addEventListener('click', () => goTo(index - 1));
182.         nextBtn?.addEventListener('click', () => goTo(index + 1));
183. 
184.         dots.forEach((dot, i) => dot.addEventListener('click', () => goTo(i)));
185.         update();
186.     }
187. </script>
188. 
189. <style>
190.     .about-content {
191.         max-width: 100%;
192.     }
193. 
194.     .profile-section {
195.         display: flex;
196.         gap: var(--spacing-6);
197.         align-items: flex-start;
198.         margin-bottom: var(--spacing-8);
199.         padding-bottom: var(--spacing-8);
200.         border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border);
201.     }
202.

207.         border-radius: var(--radius-full);

217.     }

224.         margin-bottom: var(--spacing-2);
225.         font-size: var(--font-size-4xl);
226.     }
227. 
228.     .tagline {
229.         font-size: var(--font-size-xl);
230.         color: var(--color-primary);
231.         margin-bottom: var(--spacing-4);
232.     }
233. 
234.     .social-links {
235.         display: flex;
236.         gap: var(--spacing-2);
237.     }
238. 
239.     .social-links a {
240.         display: flex;
241.         align-items: center;
242.         justify-content: center;
243.         width: 40px;
244.         height: 40px;
245.         background-color: var(--color-bg-secondary);
246.         border-radius: var(--radius-full);
247.         color: var(--color-text-secondary);
248.         font-weight: var(--font-weight-bold);
249.         text-decoration: none;
250.         transition: all var(--transition-fast);
251.     }
252. 
253.     .social-links .social-icon {
254.         width: 20px;
255.         height: 20px;
256.         display: block;
257.     }
258. 
259.     .social-links .social-icon path {
260.         shape-rendering: geometricPrecision;
261.     }
262. 
263.     .social-links a:hover {
264.         background-color: var(--color-primary);
265.         color: var(--color-text-inverse);
266.     }
267. 
268.     .bio-section {
269.         font-size: var(--font-size-lg);
270.         line-height: var(--line-height-relaxed);
271.         margin-bottom: var(--spacing-10);
272.     }
273. 
274.     .bio-section :global(p) {
275.         margin-bottom: var(--spacing-4);
276.     }
277. 
278.     .cta-section {
279.         background-color: var(--color-primary-bg);
280.         padding: var(--spacing-8);
281.         border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
282.         text-align: center;
283.         margin-bottom: var(--spacing-10);
284.     }
285. 
286.     .cta-section h2 {
287.         margin-bottom: var(--spacing-2);
288.     }
289. 
290.     .cta-section p {
291.         color: var(--color-text-secondary);
292.         margin-bottom: var(--spacing-4);
293.     }
294. 
295.     .cta-buttons {
296.         display: flex;
297.         gap: var(--spacing-3);
298.         justify-content: center;
299.         flex-wrap: wrap;
300.     }
301. 
302.     .gallery-section h2 {
303.         margin-bottom: var(--spacing-6);
304.     }
305. 
306.     .gallery-slider {
307.         position: relative;
308.         overflow: hidden;
309.         border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
310.         background-color: var(--color-bg-secondary);
311.     }
312. 
313.     .gallery-track {
314.         display: flex;
315.         transition: transform var(--transition-normal);
316.         will-change: transform;
317.     }
318. 
319.     .gallery-slide {
320.         position: relative;
321.         min-width: 100%;
322.         aspect-ratio: 16 / 10;
323.         overflow: hidden;
324.     }
325. 
326.     .gallery-slide img {
327.         width: 100%;
328.         height: 100%;
329.         object-fit: cover;
330.         transition: transform var(--transition-normal);
331.     }
332. 
333.     .gallery-slide:hover img {
334.         transform: scale(1.05);
335.     }
336. 
337.     .gallery-download {
338.         position: absolute;
339.         top: var(--spacing-3);
340.         right: var(--spacing-3);
341.         z-index: 10;
342.         display: flex;
343.         align-items: center;
344.         justify-content: center;
345.         width: 40px;
346.         height: 40px;
347.         background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.55);
348.         color: white;
349.         border: none;
350.         border-radius: var(--radius-md);
351.         cursor: pointer;
352.         text-decoration: none;
353.         transition: all var(--transition-fast);
354.         font-size: var(--font-size-lg);
355.     }
356. 
357.     .gallery-download:hover {
358.         background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.85);
359.     }
360. 
361.     .download-icon {
362.         display: block;
363.         line-height: 1;
364.     }
365. 
366.     .gallery-nav {
367.         position: absolute;
368.         top: 50%;
369.         transform: translateY(-50%);
370.         border: none;
371.         background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.55);
372.         color: white;
373.         padding: var(--spacing-2) var(--spacing-3);
374.         border-radius: var(--radius-md);
375.         cursor: pointer;
376.         font-size: var(--font-size-sm);
377.     }
378. 
379.     .gallery-nav.prev {
380.         left: var(--spacing-3);
381.     }
382. 
383.     .gallery-nav.next {
384.         right: var(--spacing-3);
385.     }
386. 
387.     .gallery-dots {
388.         position: absolute;
389.         bottom: var(--spacing-3);
390.         left: 50%;
391.         transform: translateX(-50%);
392.         display: flex;
393.         gap: var(--spacing-2);
394.         background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
395.         padding: var(--spacing-2) var(--spacing-3);
396.         border-radius: var(--radius-full);
397.     }
398. 
399.                 let autoPlayId;
400.                 let startX = 0;
401.                 let isTouching = false;
402.                 const prefersReducedMotion = window.matchMedia('(prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)').matches;
403.     .gallery-dot {
404.         width: 10px;
405.         height: 10px;
406.         border-radius: var(--radius-full);
407.         border: none;
408.         background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6);
409.         cursor: pointer;
410.     }
411. 
412.     .gallery-dot.active {
413.         background-color: white;
414.     }
415. 
416. 
417.                 const resetAutoPlay = () => {
418.                     if (prefersReducedMotion || slides.length < 2) return;
419.                     if (autoPlayId) clearInterval(autoPlayId);
420.                     autoPlayId = setInterval(() => goTo(index + 1), 5000);
421.                 };
422.     @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
423.                 prevBtn?.addEventListener('click', () => {
424.                     goTo(index - 1);
425.                     resetAutoPlay();
426.                 });
427.                 nextBtn?.addEventListener('click', () => {
428.                     goTo(index + 1);
429.                     resetAutoPlay();
430.                 });
431.         }
432.                 dots.forEach((dot, i) => dot.addEventListener('click', () => {
433.                     goTo(i);
434.                     resetAutoPlay();
435.                 }));
436. 
437.                 slider.addEventListener('touchstart', (event) => {
438.                     if (!event.touches?.length) return;
439.                     isTouching = true;
440.                     startX = event.touches[0].clientX;
441.                 }, { passive: true });
442. 
443.                 slider.addEventListener('touchend', (event) => {
444.                     if (!isTouching) return;
445.                     isTouching = false;
446.                     const endX = event.changedTouches[0]?.clientX ?? startX;
447.                     const delta = endX - startX;
448.                     if (Math.abs(delta) > 40) {
449.                         goTo(delta > 0 ? index - 1 : index + 1);
450.                         resetAutoPlay();
451.                     }
452.                 });
453. 
454.     @media (max-width: 768px) {
455.                 resetAutoPlay();
456.         .profile-section {
457.             flex-direction: column;
458.             align-items: center;
459.             text-align: center;
460.         }
461. 
462.         .profile-image {
463.             width: 150px;
464.             height: 150px;
465.         }
466. 
467.         .social-links {
468.             justify-content: center;
469.         }
470. 
471.         .gallery-nav {
472.             padding: var(--spacing-2);
473.         }
474.     }
475. </style>
476.
```

</details>

```
2. import BaseLayout from '../../../../layouts/BaseLayout.astro';
3. import Badge from '../../../../components/ui/Badge.astro';
4. import Button from '../../../../components/ui/Button.astro';
5. import TabNav from '../../../../components/ui/TabNav.astro';
6. import TabSyncScript from '../../../../components/ui/TabSyncScript.astro';
7. import { getCollection, render } from 'astro:content';

9. 
10. export async function getStaticPaths() {
11.     const meetupEvents = await getCollection('meetupEvents');
12.     const meetupGroups = await getCollection('meetupGroups');
13.     
14.     return meetupEvents.map((event) => {
15.         const group = meetupGroups.find(g => g.data.slug === event.data.meetupGroup);
16.         return {
17.             params: { 
18.                 groupSlug: event.data.meetupGroup,
19.                 eventSlug: event.id 
20.             },
21.             props: { event, group },
22.         };
23.     });
24. }
25. 
26. const { event, group } = Astro.props;
27. const { Content } = await render(event);
28. 
29. // Determine if event is upcoming or past
30. const now = new Date();
31. const eventDate = new Date(event.data.date);
32. const isUpcoming = eventDate >= now;
33. 
34. // Format date
35. const dateFormatter = new Intl.DateTimeFormat('en-US', {
36.     weekday: 'long',
37.     year: 'numeric',
38.     month: 'long',
39.     day: 'numeric'
40. });
41. const formattedDate = dateFormatter.format(eventDate);
42. 
43. const tabs = [
44.     { id: 'details', label: 'Event Details' },
45.     { id: 'speaker', label: 'About the Speaker' },
46.     { id: 'resources', label: 'Resources' },
47. ];
48. 
49. // Get current tab from URL
50. const currentTab = Astro.url.searchParams.get('tab') || 'details';
51. ---

53. <BaseLayout 
54.     title={event.data.title}
55.     description={event.data.description}
56.     ogImage={event.data.heroImage || event.data.thumbnail}
57. >
58.     <!-- Event Header -->

60.         <div class="container">
61.             <div class="header-content">
62.                 {(event.data.heroImage || event.data.thumbnail) && (

64.                         <img 
65.                             src={event.data.heroImage || event.data.thumbnail || '/images/meetups/default-meetup.svg'} 
66.                             alt="" 
67.                             loading="eager"
68.                         />
69.                     </div>
70.                 )}
71.                 <div class="header-info">
72.                     <div class="header-meta">
73.                         {group && (
74.                             <a href={`/meetups/${group.data.slug}`}>
75.                                 <Badge variant="primary">{group.data.title}</Badge>
76.                             </a>
77.                         )}

79.                             {isUpcoming ? 'Upcoming' : 'Past Event'}
80.                         </Badge>
81.                     </div>

84.                     
85.                     <div class="event-info">

87.                             <span class="info-icon">📅</span>
88.                             <span>{formattedDate}</span>
89.                         </div>

92.                                 <span class="info-icon">🕐</span>
93.                                 <span>{event.data.time}</span>
94.                             </div>
95.                         )}
96.                         {event.data.location?.venue && (

99.                                 <span>
```

## Full File Contents

### **1. `src/pages/index.astro` - Home Page**
Homepage showcasing upcoming events and recent blog posts with CTAs.

```astro
---
import BaseLayout from '../layouts/BaseLayout.astro';
import Hero from '../components/ui/Hero.astro';
import Button from '../components/ui/Button.astro';
import EventCard from '../components/cards/EventCard.astro';
import BlogCard from '../components/cards/BlogCard.astro';
import { getCollection } from 'astro:content';

// Get upcoming events
const allEvents = await getCollection('events');
const now = new Date();
const upcomingEvents = allEvents
    .filter(e =\> e.data.startDate \>= now)
    .sort((a, b) =\> a.data.startDate.getTime() - b.data.startDate.getTime())
    .slice(0, 4);

// Get recent blog posts
const allPosts = await getCollection('blog', ({ data }) =\> !data.draft);
const recentPosts = allPosts
    .sort((a, b) =\> b.data.pubDate.getTime() - a.data.pubDate.getTime())
    .slice(0, 3);
---

\<BaseLayout title="Home"\>
    \<!-- Hero Section --\>
    \<Hero
        title="Chad Green"
        tagline="Speaker • Community Leader • Developer"
        image="/images/profile/home-hero.jpg"
        imageAlt="Chad Green"        variant="overlay"    \>
        \<Button href="/presentations" variant="primary"\>View Presentations\</Button\>
        \<Button href="/contact" variant="outline"\>Book Me to Speak\</Button\>
    \</Hero\>

    \<!-- Upcoming Events Section --\>
    \<section class="section"\>
        \<div class="container"\>
            \<div class="section-header"\>
                \<h2 class="section-title"\>Upcoming Events\</h2\>
                \<p class="section-subtitle"\>Catch me at these upcoming speaking engagements\</p\>
            \</div\>

            {upcomingEvents.length \> 0 ? (
                \<div class="events-grid grid grid-4"\>
                    {upcomingEvents.map((event) =\> (
                        \<EventCard
                            title={event.data.title}
                            slug={event.id}
                            startDate={event.data.startDate}
                            endDate={event.data.endDate}
                            location={event.data.location}
                            heroImage={event.data.heroImage}
                            eventType={event.data.eventType}
                            eventUrl={event.data.website}
                            compact
                        /\>
                    ))}
                \</div\>
            ) : (
                \<div class="empty-state"\>
                    \<p\>No upcoming events scheduled. Check back soon!\</p\>
                \</div\>
            )}

            \<div class="section-footer"\>
                \<Button href="/speaking" variant="outline"\>View All Speaking Engagements\</Button\>
            \</div\>
        \</div\>
    \</section\>

    \<!-- Recent Blog Posts Section --\>
    \<section class="section section-alt"\>
        \<div class="container"\>
            \<div class="section-header"\>
                \<h2 class="section-title"\>Recent Blog Posts\</h2\>
                \<p class="section-subtitle"\>Thoughts on technology, speaking, and community\</p\>
            \</div\>

            {recentPosts.length \> 0 ? (
                \<div class="posts-grid grid grid-3"\>
                    {recentPosts.map((post) =\> (
                        \<BlogCard
                            title={post.data.title}
                            description={post.data.description}
                            slug={post.id}
                            pubDate={post.data.pubDate}
                            heroImage={post.data.heroImage}
                            category={post.data.category}
                            tags={post.data.tags}
                            featured={post.data.featured}
                        /\>
                    ))}
                \</div\>
            ) : (
                \<div class="empty-state"\>
                    \<p\>No blog posts yet. Check back soon!\</p\>
                \</div\>
            )}

            \<div class="section-footer"\>
                \<Button href="/blog" variant="outline"\>View All Posts\</Button\>
            \</div\>
        \</div\>
    \</section\>

    \<!-- Call to Action --\>
    \<section class="section cta-section"\>
        \<div class="container"\>
            \<div class="cta-content"\>
                \<h2\>Looking for a Speaker?\</h2\>
                \<p\>I'd love to present at your conference, meetup, or corporate event. Let's discuss how I can help make your event a success.\</p\>
                \<Button href="/contact" variant="primary" size="lg"\>Get in Touch\</Button\>
            \</div\>
        \</div\>
    \</section\>
\</BaseLayout\>

\<style\>
    .section-alt {
        background-color: var(--color-bg-secondary);
    }

    .section-header {
        text-align: center;
        margin-bottom: var(--spacing-10);
    }

    .section-footer {
        text-align: center;
        margin-top: var(--spacing-8);
    }

    .empty-state {
        text-align: center;
        padding: var(--spacing-12);
        background-color: var(--color-bg-secondary);
        border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
        color: var(--color-text-secondary);
    }

    .cta-section {
        background-color: var(--color-primary);
        color: var(--color-text-inverse);
    }

    .cta-content {
        text-align: center;
        max-width: 600px;
        margin: 0 auto;
    }

    .cta-content h2 {
        color: var(--color-text-inverse);
        margin-bottom: var(--spacing-4);
    }

    .cta-content p {
        margin-bottom: var(--spacing-6);
        opacity: 0.9;
    }
\</style\>
```
