### **2. `src/pages/contact.astro` - Contact Page**
Contact form and information with multiple contact methods.

```astro
---
import BaseLayout from '../layouts/BaseLayout.astro';
import PageHeader from '../components/ui/PageHeader.astro';
import ContactForm from '../components/forms/ContactForm.astro';
---

\<BaseLayout 
    title="Contact" 
    description="Get in touch with Chad Green for speaking engagements, media inquiries, collaborations, or general questions."
\>
    \<PageHeader title="Contact"\>
        \<p\>I'd love to hear from you!\</p\>
    \</PageHeader\>

    \<section class="section"\>
        \<div class="container"\>
            \<div class="contact-layout"\>
                \<div class="contact-info"\>
                    \<h2\>Let's Connect\</h2\>
                    \<p\>Whether you're looking for a speaker for your next event, have a media inquiry, or just want to say hello, I'm here to help.\</p\>
                    
                    \<div class="contact-methods"\>
                        \<div class="contact-method"\>
                            \<span class="method-icon"\>📧\</span\>
                            \<div class="method-info"\>
                                \<h3\>Email\</h3\>
                                \<a href="mailto:chadgreen@chadgreen.com"\>chadgreen@chadgreen.com\</a\>
                            \</div\>
                        \</div\>
                        
                        \<div class="contact-method"\>
                            \<span class="method-icon"\>🐦\</span\>
                            \<div class="method-info"\>
                                \<h3\>Twitter/X\</h3\>
                                \<a href="https://twitter.com/chadgreen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"\>@chadgreen\</a\>
                            \</div\>
                        \</div\>
                        
                        \<div class="contact-method"\>
                            \<span class="method-icon"\>💼\</span\>
                            \<div class="method-info"\>
                                \<h3\>LinkedIn\</h3\>
                                \<a href="https://linkedin.com/in/chadgreen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"\>/in/chadgreen\</a\>
                            \</div\>
                        \</div\>
                    \</div\>

                    \<div class="response-note"\>
                        \<p\>\<strong\>Response Time:\</strong\> I typically respond within 2-3 business days. For urgent speaking inquiries, please mention the event date in your message.\</p\>
                    \</div\>
                \</div\>

                \<div class="contact-form-wrapper"\>
                    \<ContactForm /\>
                \</div\>
            \</div\>
        \</div\>
    \</section\>
\</BaseLayout\>

\<style\>
    .contact-layout {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: 1fr 2fr;
        gap: var(--spacing-12);
        align-items: start;
    }

    .contact-info h2 {
        margin-bottom: var(--spacing-4);
    }

    .contact-info \> p {
        color: var(--color-text-secondary);
        margin-bottom: var(--spacing-8);
    }

    .contact-methods {
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        gap: var(--spacing-4);
        margin-bottom: var(--spacing-8);
    }

    .contact-method {
        display: flex;
        align-items: flex-start;
        gap: var(--spacing-3);
        padding: var(--spacing-4);
        background-color: var(--color-bg-secondary);
        border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
    }

    .method-icon {
        font-size: 1.5rem;
    }

    .method-info h3 {
        font-size: var(--font-size-base);
        margin-bottom: var(--spacing-1);
    }

    .method-info a {
        color: var(--color-primary);
        text-decoration: none;
    }

    .method-info a:hover {
        text-decoration: underline;
    }

    .response-note {
        padding: var(--spacing-4);
        background-color: var(--color-primary-bg);
        border-radius: var(--radius-md);
        border-left: 4px solid var(--color-primary);
    }

    .response-note p {
        margin: 0;
        font-size: var(--font-size-sm);
        color: var(--color-text-secondary);
    }

    @media (max-width: 1024px) {
        .contact-layout {
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        }

        .contact-info {
            text-align: center;
        }

        .contact-methods {
            max-width: 400px;
            margin-left: auto;
            margin-right: auto;
        }
    }
\</style\>
```

### **3. `src/pages/404.astro` - 404 Error Page**
Page not found error page with navigation options.

```astro
---
import BaseLayout from '../layouts/BaseLayout.astro';
import Button from '../components/ui/Button.astro';
---

\<BaseLayout title="Page Not Found"\>
    \<section class="not-found"\>
        \<div class="container"\>
            \<div class="content"\>
                \<div class="error-code"\>404\</div\>
                \<h1\>Page Not Found\</h1\>
                \<p\>Oops! The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.\</p\>
                \<div class="actions"\>
                    \<Button href="/" variant="primary"\>Go Home\</Button\>
                    \<Button href="/contact" variant="outline"\>Contact Me\</Button\>
                \</div\>
            \</div\>
        \</div\>
    \</section\>
\</BaseLayout\>

\<style\>
    .not-found {
        min-height: 60vh;
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        text-align: center;
        padding: var(--spacing-12) 0;
    }

    .content {
        max-width: 500px;
    }

    .error-code {
        font-size: 8rem;
        font-weight: var(--font-weight-bold);
        color: var(--color-primary);
        line-height: 1;
        margin-bottom: var(--spacing-4);
    }

    h1 {
        font-size: var(--font-size-3xl);
        margin-bottom: var(--spacing-4);
    }

    p {
        color: var(--color-text-secondary);
        font-size: var(--font-size-lg);
        margin-bottom: var(--spacing-8);
    }

    .actions {
        display: flex;
        gap: var(--spacing-4);
        justify-content: center;
    }

    @media (max-width: 640px) {
        .error-code {
            font-size: 5rem;
        }

        .actions {
            flex-direction: column;
        }
    }
\</style\>
```

---

### **4. `src/pages/presentations/index.astro` - Presentations Listing Page**
Browse all presentations with filtering by type.

```astro
---
import BaseLayout from '../../layouts/BaseLayout.astro';
import PageHeader from '../../components/ui/PageHeader.astro';
import PresentationCard from '../../components/cards/PresentationCard.astro';
import { getCollection } from 'astro:content';

// Get all active presentations
let presentations: any[] = [];
try {
    const allPresentations = await getCollection('presentations');
    presentations = allPresentations
        .sort((a, b) =\> {
            // Featured first, then by creation date
            if (a.data.featured && !b.data.featured) return -1;
            if (!a.data.featured && b.data.featured) return 1;
            const dateA = a.data.createdDate?.getTime() || 0;
            const dateB = b.data.createdDate?.getTime() || 0;
            return dateB - dateA;
        });
} catch (e) {
    // Collection might not exist yet
}

// Group by type for filtering
const presentationTypes = [...new Set(presentations.map(p =\> p.data.type))];
---

\<BaseLayout 
    title="Presentations" 
    description="Browse all presentations by Chad Green on Azure, .NET, DevOps, and more."
\>
    \<PageHeader title="Presentations"\>
        \<p\>Explore my collection of talks, workshops, and presentations\</p\>
    \</PageHeader\>

    \<section class="section"\>
        \<div class="container"\>
            \<!-- Filter Controls --\>
            {presentationTypes.length \> 1 && (
                \<div class="filter-controls"\>
                    \<button class="filter-btn active" data-filter="all"\>All\</button\>
                    {presentationTypes.map((type) =\> (
                        \<button class="filter-btn" data-filter={type}\>
                            {type.replace('-', ' ').replace(/\b\w/g, l =\> l.toUpperCase())}
                        \</button\>
                    ))}
                \</div\>
            )}

            {presentations.length \> 0 ? (
                \<div class="presentations-grid grid grid-3" id="presentations-grid"\>
                    {presentations.map((presentation) =\> (
                        \<div class="presentation-item" data-type={presentation.data.type}\>
                            \<PresentationCard
                                title={presentation.data.title}
                                description={presentation.data.description}
                                slug={presentation.id}
                                thumbnail={presentation.data.heroImage}
                                presentationType={presentation.data.type}
                                tags={presentation.data.tags}
                                featured={presentation.data.featured}
                            /\>
                        \</div\>
                    ))}
                \</div\>
            ) : (
                \<div class="empty-state"\>
                    \<h3\>No Presentations Yet\</h3\>
                    \<p\>Check back soon for my collection of presentations.\</p\>
                \</div\>
            )}
        \</div\>
    \</section\>

    \<!-- Book CTA --\>
    \<section class="book-cta"\>
        \<div class="container"\>
            \<div class="cta-content"\>
                \<p\>
                    \<strong\>Interested in one of these presentations?\</strong\>\<br\>
                    Email \<a href="mailto:chadgreen@chadgreen.com"\>chadgreen@chadgreen.com\</a\> to have Chad present at your event.
                \</p\>
            \</div\>
        \</div\>
    \</section\>
\</BaseLayout\>

\<style\>
    .filter-controls {
        display: flex;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
        gap: var(--spacing-2);
        margin-bottom: var(--spacing-8);
        justify-content: center;
    }

    .filter-btn {
        padding: var(--spacing-2) var(--spacing-4);
        background-color: var(--color-bg-secondary);
        border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
        border-radius: var(--radius-full);
        font-size: var(--font-size-sm);
        font-weight: var(--font-weight-medium);
        color: var(--color-text-secondary);
        cursor: pointer;
        transition: all var(--transition-fast);
    }

    .filter-btn:hover {
        border-color: var(--color-primary);
        color: var(--color-primary);
    }

    .filter-btn.active {
        background-color: var(--color-primary);
        border-color: var(--color-primary);
        color: var(--color-text-inverse);
    }

    .presentation-item {
        transition: opacity var(--transition-fast);
    }

    .presentation-item.hidden {
        display: none;
    }

    .empty-state {
        text-align: center;
        padding: var(--spacing-16);
        background-color: var(--color-bg-secondary);
        border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
    }

    .empty-state h3 {
        margin-bottom: var(--spacing-2);
    }

    .empty-state p {
        color: var(--color-text-secondary);
        margin-bottom: 0;
    }

    .book-cta {
        background-color: var(--color-primary-bg);
        padding: var(--spacing-8) 0;
    }

    .book-cta .cta-content {
        text-align: center;
    }

    .book-cta a {
        color: var(--color-primary);
        font-weight: var(--font-weight-semibold);
    }
\</style\>

\<script\>
    const filterBtns = document.querySelectorAll('.filter-btn');
    const items = document.querySelectorAll('.presentation-item');

    filterBtns.forEach(btn =\> {
        btn.addEventListener('click', () =\> {
            const filter = (btn as HTMLElement).dataset.filter;

            // Update active state
            filterBtns.forEach(b =\> b.classList.remove('active'));
            btn.classList.add('active');

            // Filter items
            items.forEach(item =\> {
                const type = (item as HTMLElement).dataset.type;
                if (filter === 'all' || type === filter) {
                    item.classList.remove('hidden');
                } else {
                    item.classList.add('hidden');
                }
            });
        });
    });
\</script\>
```

---

### **5. `src/pages/presentations/[slug].astro` - Individual Presentation Page**
Detailed presentation page with tabs for abstract, learning objectives, events, and resources.

```astro
---
import BaseLayout from '../../layouts/BaseLayout.astro';
import Badge from '../../components/ui/Badge.astro';
import Button from '../../components/ui/Button.astro';
import TabNav from '../../components/ui/TabNav.astro';
import TabSyncScript from '../../components/ui/TabSyncScript.astro';
import EventCard from '../../components/cards/EventCard.astro';
import { getCollection, render } from 'astro:content';
import { marked } from 'marked';

export async function getStaticPaths() {
    const presentations = await getCollection('presentations');
    return presentations.map((presentation) =\> ({
        params: { slug: presentation.id },
        props: { presentation },
    }));
}

const { presentation } = Astro.props;
const { Content } = await render(presentation);

// Get related presentations
let relatedPresentations: any[] = [];
if (presentation.data.relatedPresentations?.length) {
    const allPresentations = await getCollection('presentations');
    relatedPresentations = allPresentations.filter(p =\> 
        presentation.data.relatedPresentations.includes(p.id)
    );
}

// Get events where this presentation was given
let presentationEvents: any[] = [];
try {
    const allEvents = await getCollection('events');
    presentationEvents = allEvents
        .filter(e =\> {
            if (!e.data.presentations) return false;
            // Handle both string format and object format
            return e.data.presentations.some((p: any) =\> {
                const presentationId = typeof p === 'string' ? p : p.id;
                return presentationId === presentation.id;
            });
        })
        .sort((a, b) =\> b.data.startDate.getTime() - a.data.startDate.getTime());
} catch (e) {
    // Collection might not exist yet
}

const tabs = [
    { id: 'abstract', label: 'Abstract' },
    { id: 'objectives', label: 'Learning Objectives' },
    { id: 'events', label: `Events (${presentationEvents.length})` },
    { id: 'resources', label: 'Resources' },
];

// Get current tab from URL
const currentTab = Astro.url.searchParams.get('tab') || 'abstract';

const typeLabels: Record\<string, string\> = {
    'session': 'Session',
    'workshop': 'Workshop',
    'lightning-talk': 'Lightning Talk',
    'keynote': 'Keynote',
    'panel': 'Panel',
    'webinar': 'Webinar',
};

const statusLabels: Record\<string, string\> = {
    'active': 'Active',
    'retired': 'Retired',
    'in-development': 'In Development',
};

const statusVariants: Record\<string, 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'outline' | 'success' | 'warning' | 'danger'\> = {
    'active': 'success',
    'retired': 'outline',
    'in-development': 'warning',
};
---

\<BaseLayout 
    title={presentation.data.title}
    description={presentation.data.description}
    ogImage={presentation.data.heroImage}
\>
    \<!-- Presentation Header --\>
    \<section class="presentation-header"\>
        \<div class="container"\>
            \<div class="header-content"\>
                \<div class="header-image"\>
                    \<img 
                        src={presentation.data.heroImage || '/images/presentations/default-thumbnail.svg'} 
                        alt="" 
                        loading="eager"
                    /\>
                \</div\>
                \<div class="header-info"\>
                    \<div class="header-meta"\>
                        \<Badge variant="primary"\>{typeLabels[presentation.data.type] || presentation.data.type}\</Badge\>
                        {presentation.data.level && \<Badge variant="secondary"\>{presentation.data.level}\</Badge\>}
                        \<Badge variant={statusVariants[presentation.data.status]}\>{statusLabels[presentation.data.status]}\</Badge\>
                        {presentation.data.durations && presentation.data.durations.length \> 0 && (
                            \<span class="duration"\>⏱ {presentation.data.durations.join(' / ')} min\</span\>
                        )}
                    \</div\>
                    
                    \<h1 class="presentation-title"\>{presentation.data.title}\</h1\>
                    
                    \<p class="presentation-description"\>{presentation.data.description}\</p\>
                    
                    {presentation.data.tags?.length \> 0 && (
                        \<div class="presentation-tags"\>
                            {presentation.data.tags.map((tag: string) =\> (
                                \<a href={`/presentations/tags/${encodeURIComponent(tag)}`} class="tag-link"\>
                                    \<Badge variant="outline" size="sm"\>{tag}\</Badge\>
                                \</a\>
                            ))}
                        \</div\>
                    )}

                    {relatedPresentations.length \> 0 && (
                        \<div class="related-presentations"\>
                            \<span class="related-label"\>Related:\</span\>
                            {relatedPresentations.map((rp) =\> (
                                \<a href={`/presentations/${rp.id}`} class="related-link"\>{rp.data.shortTitle || rp.data.title}\</a\>
                            ))}
                        \</div\>
                    )}
                \</div\>
            \</div\>
        \</div\>
    \</section\>

    \<!-- Tab Navigation --\>
    \<div class="tabs-container"\>
        \<div class="container"\>
            \<TabNav 
                tabs={tabs.map(t =\> ({ ...t, href: `?tab=${t.id}` }))} 
                activeTab={currentTab} 
            /\>
        \</div\>
    \</div\>

    \<!-- Tab Content --\>
    \<section class="section tab-content"\>
        \<div class="container"\>
            \<!-- Abstract Tab --\>
            \<div class="tab-panel" data-tab="abstract" style={currentTab !== 'abstract' ? 'display: none;' : ''}\>
                \<div class="prose"\>
                    {presentation.data.abstract ? (
                        \<div set:html={presentation.data.abstract} /\>
                    ) : (
                        \<Content /\>
                    )}
                \</div\>
            \</div\>

            \<!-- Learning Objectives Tab --\>
            \<div class="tab-panel" data-tab="objectives" style={currentTab !== 'objectives' ? 'display: none;' : ''}\>
                {presentation.data.learningObjectives?.length \> 0 ? (
                    \<div class="objectives-list"\>
                        \<h2\>What You'll Learn\</h2\>
                        \<ul\>
                            {presentation.data.learningObjectives.map((objective: string, index: number) =\> (
                                \<li\>
                                    \<span class="objective-number"\>{index + 1}\</span\>
                                    \<span class="objective-text" set:html={marked.parseInline(objective)} /\>
                                \</li\>
                            ))}
                        \</ul\>
                    \</div\>
                ) : (
                    \<div class="empty-state"\>
                        \<p\>Learning objectives coming soon.\</p\>
                    \</div\>
                )}
            \</div\>

            \<!-- Events Tab --\>
            \<div class="tab-panel" data-tab="events" style={currentTab !== 'events' ? 'display: none;' : ''}\>
                {presentationEvents.length \> 0 ? (
                    \<div class="events-list"\>
                        \<h2\>Where I've Presented This\</h2\>
                        \<div class="grid grid-3"\>
                            {presentationEvents.map((event) =\> (
                                \<EventCard
                                    title={event.data.title}
                                    slug={event.id}
                                    startDate={event.data.startDate}
                                    endDate={event.data.endDate}
                                    location={event.data.location}
                                    heroImage={event.data.heroImage}
                                    logo={event.data.logo}
                                    thumbnail={event.data.thumbnail}
                                    eventType={event.data.eventType}
                                    status={event.data.status}
                                    eventUrl={event.data.eventUrl}
                                    slidesUrl={event.data.slidesUrl}
                                    demosUrl={event.data.demosUrl}
                                /\>
                            ))}
                        \</div\>
                    \</div\>
                ) : (
                    \<div class="empty-state"\>
                        \<p\>No events scheduled yet for this presentation.\</p\>
                    \</div\>
                )}
            \</div\>

            \<!-- Resources Tab --\>
            \<div class="tab-panel" data-tab="resources" style={currentTab !== 'resources' ? 'display: none;' : ''}\>
                {presentation.data.resources?.length \> 0 ? (
                    \<div class="resources-list"\>
                        \<h2\>Resources\</h2\>
                        \<div class="resources-grid"\>
                            {presentation.data.resources.map((resource: any) =\> (
                                \<a href={resource.url} target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="resource-card"\>
                                    \<span class="resource-icon"\>
                                        {resource.type === 'slides' && '📊'}
                                        {resource.type === 'video' && '🎬'}
                                        {resource.type === 'github' && '💻'}
                                        {resource.type === 'demo' && '🚀'}
                                        {resource.type === 'blog' && '📝'}
                                        {resource.type === 'download' && '⬇️'}
                                        {resource.type === 'other' && '🔗'}
                                    \</span\>
                                    \<span class="resource-title"\>{resource.title}\</span\>
                                    {resource.description && \<span class="resource-desc"\>{resource.description}\</span\>}
                                \</a\>
                            ))}
                        \</div\>
                    \</div\>
                ) : (
                    \<div class="empty-state"\>
                        \<p\>Resources coming soon.\</p\>
                    \</div\>
                )}
            \</div\>
        \</div\>
    \</section\>

    \<!-- Book CTA --\>
    \<section class="book-cta"\>
        \<div class="container"\>
            \<div class="cta-content"\>
                \<p\>
                    \<strong\>Want me to present this at your event?\</strong\>\<br\>
                    Email \<a href="mailto:chadgreen@chadgreen.com"\>chadgreen@chadgreen.com\</a\> to book this presentation.
                \</p\>
                \<Button href="/contact?type=speaking" variant="primary"\>Contact Me\</Button\>
            \</div\>
        \</div\>
    \</section\>

    \<TabSyncScript /\>
\</BaseLayout\>

\<style\>
    .presentation-header {
        background-color: var(--color-bg-secondary);
        padding: var(--spacing-10) 0;
    }

    .header-content {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: 350px 1fr;
        gap: var(--spacing-8);
        align-items: start;
    }

    .header-image {
        border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
        overflow: hidden;
        box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg);
    }

    .header-image img {
        width: 100%;
        height: auto;
    }

    .header-meta {
        display: flex;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
        align-items: center;
        gap: var(--spacing-2);
        margin-bottom: var(--spacing-4);
    }

    .duration {
        font-size: var(--font-size-sm);
        color: var(--color-text-secondary);
    }

    .presentation-title {
        font-size: var(--font-size-4xl);
        margin-bottom: var(--spacing-4);
        line-height: 1.2;
    }

    .presentation-description {
        font-size: var(--font-size-lg);
        color: var(--color-text-secondary);
        margin-bottom: var(--spacing-4);
    }

    .presentation-tags {
        display: flex;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
        gap: var(--spacing-2);
        margin-bottom: var(--spacing-4);
    }

    .presentation-tags .tag-link {
        text-decoration: none;
    }

    .presentation-tags .tag-link:hover :global(.badge) {
        background-color: var(--color-primary);
        color: white;
        border-color: var(--color-primary);
    }

    .related-presentations {
        display: flex;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
        align-items: center;
        gap: var(--spacing-2);
        font-size: var(--font-size-sm);
    }

    .related-label {
        color: var(--color-text-secondary);
    }

    .related-link {
        color: var(--color-primary);
    }

    .tabs-container {
        background-color: var(--color-bg-primary);
        border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border);
        position: sticky;
        top: var(--header-height);
        z-index: var(--z-sticky);
    }

    .tab-content {
        min-height: 400px;
    }

    .prose {
        max-width: 800px;
        font-size: var(--font-size-lg);
        line-height: var(--line-height-relaxed);
    }

    .objectives-list h2,
    .events-list h2,
    .resources-list h2 {
        margin-bottom: var(--spacing-6);
    }

    .objectives-list ul {
        list-style: none;
        padding: 0;
    }

    .objectives-list li {
        display: flex;
        align-items: flex-start;
        gap: var(--spacing-4);
        margin-bottom: var(--spacing-4);
        padding: var(--spacing-4);
        background-color: var(--color-bg-secondary);
        border-radius: var(--radius-md);
    }

    .objective-number {
        flex-shrink: 0;
        width: 32px;
        height: 32px;
        background-color: var(--color-primary);
        color: var(--color-text-inverse);
        border-radius: var(--radius-full);
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        font-weight: var(--font-weight-bold);
    }

    .objective-text {
        font-size: var(--font-size-lg);
    }

    .resources-grid {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(250px, 1fr));
        gap: var(--spacing-4);
    }

    .resource-card {
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        padding: var(--spacing-4);
        background-color: var(--color-bg-secondary);
        border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
        border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
        text-decoration: none;
        transition: all var(--transition-fast);
    }

    .resource-card:hover {
        border-color: var(--color-primary);
        transform: translateY(-2px);
    }

    .resource-icon {
        font-size: 2rem;
        margin-bottom: var(--spacing-2);
    }

    .resource-title {
        font-weight: var(--font-weight-semibold);
        color: var(--color-text-primary);
    }

    .resource-desc {
        font-size: var(--font-size-sm);
        color: var(--color-text-secondary);
        margin-top: var(--spacing-1);
    }

    .empty-state {
        text-align: center;
        padding: var(--spacing-12);
        background-color: var(--color-bg-secondary);
        border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
        color: var(--color-text-secondary);
    }

    .book-cta {
        background-color: var(--color-primary-bg);
        padding: var(--spacing-10) 0;
    }

    .cta-content {
        text-align: center;
        max-width: 600px;
        margin: 0 auto;
    }

    .cta-content p {
        margin-bottom: var(--spacing-4);
    }

    .cta-content a {
        color: var(--color-primary);
        font-weight: var(--font-weight-semibold);
    }

    @media (max-width: 1024px) {
        .header-content {
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        }

        .header-image {
            max-width: 400px;
        }

        .presentation-title {
            font-size: var(--font-size-3xl);
        }
    }
\</style\>

\<script\>
    // Handle tab navigation without page reload
    const tabLinks = document.querySelectorAll('.tab-nav a');
    const tabPanels = document.querySelectorAll('.tab-panel');

    tabLinks.forEach(link =\> {
        link.addEventListener('click', (e) =\> {
            e.preventDefault();
            const url = new URL((link as HTMLAnchorElement).href);
            const tabId = url.searchParams.get('tab');

            // Update URL without reload
            window.history.pushState({}, '', url);

            // Update active tab
            tabLinks.forEach(l =\> l.classList.remove('tab-active'));
            link.classList.add('tab-active');

            // Show corresponding panel
            tabPanels.forEach(panel =\> {
                if ((panel as HTMLElement).dataset.tab === tabId) {
                    (panel as HTMLElement).style.display = 'block';
                } else {
                    (panel as HTMLElement).style.display = 'none';
                }
            });
        });
    });
\</script\>
```

---

### **6. `src/pages/presentations/[slug]/events.astro` - Presentation Events Redirect**
Redirect page that routes to the presentation events tab.

```astro
---
import BaseLayout from '../../../layouts/BaseLayout.astro';
import { getCollection } from 'astro:content';

export async function getStaticPaths() {
    const presentations = await getCollection('presentations');

    return presentations.map((presentation) =\> ({
        params: { slug: presentation.id },
        props: {
            targetPath: `/presentations/${presentation.id}?tab=events`,
            presentationTitle: presentation.data.title,
        },
    }));
}

const { targetPath, presentationTitle } = Astro.props;
---

\<BaseLayout
    title={`${presentationTitle} Events`}
    description={`Redirecting to the events tab for ${presentationTitle}.`}
    canonicalUrl={new URL(targetPath, Astro.url.origin).toString()}
\>
    \<section class="section"\>
        \<div class="container redirect-page"\>
            \<h1\>Redirecting...\</h1\>
            \<p\>If you are not redirected automatically, continue to \<a id="redirect-link" href={targetPath}\>events for this presentation\</a\>.\</p\>
        \</div\>
    \</section\>

    \<script is:inline\>
        const redirectLink = document.getElementById('redirect-link');
        if (redirectLink instanceof HTMLAnchorElement) {
            window.location.replace(redirectLink.href);
        }
    \</script\>
\</BaseLayout\>

\<style\>
    .redirect-page {
        text-align: center;
        max-width: 760px;
    }
\</style\>
```

---

### **7. `src/pages/presentations/[slug]/events/[eventSlug].astro` - Presentation at Specific Event**
Engagement presentation page (session details for a presentation at a specific event).

```astro
---
import { getCollection } from 'astro:content';
import EngagementPresentationPage from '@/components/presentations/EngagementPresentationPage.astro';
import { getCanonicalPath } from '@/lib/engagementPresentations';

export async function getStaticPaths() {
    const engagementPresentations = await getCollection('engagementPresentations');

    return engagementPresentations.map((engagement) =\> ({
        params: {
            slug: engagement.data.presentationSlug,
            eventSlug: engagement.data.eventSlug,
        },
        props: { engagement },
    }));
}

const { engagement } = Astro.props;

const [events, presentations] = await Promise.all([
    getCollection('events'),
    getCollection('presentations'),
]);

const event = events.find((entry) =\> entry.id === engagement.data.eventSlug);
const presentation = presentations.find((entry) =\> entry.id === engagement.data.presentationSlug);

const canonicalPath = getCanonicalPath(engagement);
const canonicalUrl = new URL(canonicalPath, Astro.url.origin).toString();
---

\<EngagementPresentationPage
    engagement={engagement}
    event={event}
    presentation={presentation}
    canonicalUrl={canonicalUrl}
/\>
```

---

### **8. `src/pages/presentations/tags/[tag].astro` - Presentations by Tag**
Browse presentations filtered by specific tag.

```astro
---
import BaseLayout from '../../../layouts/BaseLayout.astro';
import PageHeader from '../../../components/ui/PageHeader.astro';
import PresentationCard from '../../../components/cards/PresentationCard.astro';
import { getCollection } from 'astro:content';

export async function getStaticPaths() {
    const presentations = await getCollection('presentations');
    
    // Get all unique tags
    const allTags = new Set\<string\>();
    presentations.forEach(presentation =\> {
        presentation.data.tags?.forEach(tag =\> allTags.add(tag));
    });

    return Array.from(allTags).map(tag =\> ({
        params: { tag },
        props: {
            tag,
            presentations: presentations.filter(p =\> p.data.tags?.includes(tag))
                .sort((a, b) =\> a.data.title.localeCompare(b.data.title))
        }
    }));
}

const { tag, presentations } = Astro.props;
---

\<BaseLayout 
    title={`Presentations tagged "${tag}"`}
    description={`All presentations tagged with ${tag}`}
\>
    \<PageHeader title={`Tag: #${tag}`}\>
        \<p\>{presentations.length} presentation{presentations.length !== 1 ? 's' : ''} with this tag\</p\>
    \</PageHeader\>

    \<section class="section"\>
        \<div class="container"\>
            \<div class="presentations-grid grid grid-3"\>
                {presentations.map((presentation: any) =\> (
                    \<PresentationCard
                        title={presentation.data.title}
                        description={presentation.data.description}
                        slug={presentation.id}
                        thumbnail={presentation.data.heroImage}
                        presentationType={presentation.data.type}
                        tags={presentation.data.tags}
                        featured={presentation.data.featured}
                    /\>
                ))}
            \</div\>
            
            \<div class="back-link"\>
                \<a href="/presentations"\>&larr; All Presentations\</a\>
            \</div\>
        \</div\>
    \</section\>
\</BaseLayout\>

\<style\>
    .back-link {
        margin-top: var(--spacing-8);
        text-align: center;
    }
    
    .back-link a {
        color: var(--color-primary);
        text-decoration: none;
        font-weight: 500;
    }
    
    .back-link a:hover {
        text-decoration: underline;
    }
\</style\>
```

---

### **9. `src/pages/speaking/index.astro` - Speaking Engagements Listing Page**
Browse upcoming and past speaking engagements with event listings.

```astro
---
import BaseLayout from '../../layouts/BaseLayout.astro';
import PageHeader from '../../components/ui/PageHeader.astro';
import EventCard from '../../components/cards/EventCard.astro';
import { getCollection } from 'astro:content';

// Get all events
let allEvents: any[] = [];
try {
    allEvents = await getCollection('events');
} catch (e) {
    // Collection might not exist yet
}

// Separate upcoming and past events
const now = new Date();
const upcomingEvents = allEvents
    .filter(e =\> e.data.startDate \>= now)
    .sort((a, b) =\> a.data.startDate.getTime() - b.data.startDate.getTime());

const pastEvents = allEvents
    .filter(e =\> e.data.startDate \< now)
    .sort((a, b) =\> b.data.startDate.getTime() - a.data.startDate.getTime());

// Group past events by year
const pastEventsByYear = pastEvents.reduce((acc, event) =\> {
    const year = event.data.startDate.getFullYear();
    if (!acc[year]) acc[year] = [];
    acc[year].push(event);
    return acc;
}, {} as Record\<number, any[]\>);

const years = Object.keys(pastEventsByYear).sort((a, b) =\> Number(b) - Number(a));

function formatDateRange(start: Date, end?: Date): string {
    const utc = { timeZone: 'UTC' as const };
    if (!end || start.getTime() === end.getTime()) {
        return start.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'short', day: 'numeric', year: 'numeric', ...utc });
    }
    const sameMonth = start.getUTCMonth() === end.getUTCMonth() && start.getUTCFullYear() === end.getUTCFullYear();
    if (sameMonth) {
        return `${start.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'short', day: 'numeric', ...utc })} - ${end.getUTCDate()}, ${end.getUTCFullYear()}`;
    }
    return `${start.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'short', day: 'numeric', ...utc })} - ${end.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'short', day: 'numeric', year: 'numeric', ...utc })}`;
}

function formatLocation(loc: any): string {
    if (loc.virtual) return 'Virtual';
    const parts = [loc.city];
    if (loc.state) parts.push(loc.state);
    parts.push(loc.country);
    return parts.join(', ');
}
---

\<BaseLayout 
    title="Speaking Engagements" 
    description="Upcoming and past speaking engagements by Chad Green at conferences, meetups, and events worldwide."
\>
    \<PageHeader title="Speaking Engagements"\>
        \<p\>Conferences, meetups, and events where I've spoken or will be speaking\</p\>
    \</PageHeader\>

    \<!-- Upcoming Events --\>
    \<section class="section"\>
        \<div class="container"\>
            \<h2 class="section-title"\>Upcoming Events\</h2\>

            {upcomingEvents.length \> 0 ? (
                \<div class="upcoming-grid grid grid-3"\>
                    {upcomingEvents.map((event) =\> (
                        \<EventCard
                            title={event.data.title}
                            slug={event.id}
                            startDate={event.data.startDate}
                            endDate={event.data.endDate}
                            location={event.data.location}
                            heroImage={event.data.heroImage}
                            eventType={event.data.eventType}
                            status="upcoming"
                            eventUrl={event.data.eventUrl}
                            featured={event.data.featured}
                        /\>
                    ))}
                \</div\>
            ) : (
                \<div class="empty-state"\>
                    \<p\>No upcoming events scheduled. Check back soon!\</p\>
                \</div\>
            )}
        \</div\>
    \</section\>

    \<!-- Past Events by Year --\>
    {years.length \> 0 && (
        \<section class="section section-alt"\>
            \<div class="container"\>
                \<h2 class="section-title"\>Past Events\</h2\>

                {years.map((year) =\> (
                    \<div class="year-section"\>
                        \<h3 class="year-heading"\>{year}\</h3\>
                        \<div class="events-table"\>
                            \<table\>
                                \<thead\>
                                    \<tr\>
                                        \<th\>Date\</th\>
                                        \<th\>Event\</th\>
                                        \<th\>Location\</th\>
                                    \</tr\>
                                \</thead\>
                                \<tbody\>
                                    {pastEventsByYear[Number(year)].map((event: any) =\> (
                                        \<tr\>
                                            \<td class="date-col"\>
                                                {formatDateRange(event.data.startDate, event.data.endDate)}
                                            \</td\>
                                            \<td class="event-col"\>
                                                \<a href={`/speaking/${event.id}`}\>{event.data.title}\</a\>
                                            \</td\>
                                            \<td class="location-col"\>
                                                {formatLocation(event.data.location)}
                                            \</td\>
                                        \</tr\>
                                    ))}
                                \</tbody\>
                            \</table\>
                        \</div\>
                    \</div\>
                ))}
            \</div\>
        \</section\>
    )}
\</BaseLayout\>

\<style\>
    .section-title {
        margin-bottom: var(--spacing-8);
    }

    .section-alt {
        background-color: var(--color-bg-secondary);
    }

    .empty-state {
        text-align: center;
        padding: var(--spacing-12);
        background-color: var(--color-bg-secondary);
        border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
        color: var(--color-text-secondary);
    }

    .year-section {
        margin-bottom: var(--spacing-10);
    }

    .year-heading {
        font-size: var(--font-size-2xl);
        color: var(--color-primary);
        margin-bottom: var(--spacing-4);
        padding-bottom: var(--spacing-2);
        border-bottom: 2px solid var(--color-primary);
    }

    .events-table {
        overflow-x: auto;
    }

    .events-table table {
        width: 100%;
        border-collapse: collapse;
    }

    .events-table th {
        text-align: left;
        padding: var(--spacing-3) var(--spacing-4);
        background-color: var(--color-bg-primary);
        font-weight: var(--font-weight-semibold);
        border-bottom: 2px solid var(--color-border);
    }

    .events-table td {
        padding: var(--spacing-3) var(--spacing-4);
        border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border-light);
    }

    .events-table tbody tr:hover {
        background-color: var(--color-bg-primary);
    }

    .date-col {
        white-space: nowrap;
        width: 180px;
        color: var(--color-text-secondary);
    }

    .event-col a {
        color: var(--color-text-primary);
        font-weight: var(--font-weight-medium);
        text-decoration: none;
    }

    .event-col a:hover {
        color: var(--color-primary);
    }

    .location-col {
        color: var(--color-text-secondary);
    }

    @media (max-width: 768px) {
        .events-table th:nth-child(3),
        .events-table td:nth-child(3) {
            display: none;
        }
    }
\</style\>
```

---

### **10. `src/pages/speaking/[slug].astro` - Individual Speaking Event Page**
Detailed event page with tabs for about and presentations.

```astro
---
import BaseLayout from '../../layouts/BaseLayout.astro';
import Badge from '../../components/ui/Badge.astro';
import Button from '../../components/ui/Button.astro';
import TabNav from '../../components/ui/TabNav.astro';
import TabSyncScript from '../../components/ui/TabSyncScript.astro';
import PresentationCard from '../../components/cards/PresentationCard.astro';
import { getCollection, render } from 'astro:content';

export async function getStaticPaths() {
    const events = await getCollection('events');
    return events.map((event) =\> ({
        params: { slug: event.id },
        props: { event },
    }));
}

const { event } = Astro.props;
const { Content } = await render(event);

// Get linked presentations with their event-specific details
let linkedPresentations: any[] = [];
if (event.data.presentations?.length) {
    const [allPresentations, allEngagementPresentations] = await Promise.all([
        getCollection('presentations'),
        getCollection('engagementPresentations'),
    ]);

    const sessionSlugByPresentationId = new Map(
        allEngagementPresentations
            .filter((entry) =\> entry.data.eventSlug === event.id)
            .map((entry) =\> [entry.data.presentationSlug, entry.data.sessionSlug])
    );
    
    linkedPresentations = event.data.presentations.map((p: any) =\> {
        // Handle both string format (old) and object format (new)
        const presentationId = typeof p === 'string' ? p : p.id;
        const presentationData = allPresentations.find(pres =\> pres.id === presentationId);
        
        if (!presentationData) return null;
        
        // Add event-specific scheduling details
        const sessionSlug = sessionSlugByPresentationId.get(presentationId);

        return {
            ...presentationData,
            detailsHref: sessionSlug
                ? `/speaking/${event.id}/presentations/${sessionSlug}`
                : `/presentations/${presentationId}`,
            sessionName: typeof p === 'object' ? p.sessionName : undefined,
            scheduleDate: typeof p === 'object' ? p.date : undefined,
            scheduleTime: typeof p === 'object' ? p.time : undefined,
            scheduleTimeZone: typeof p === 'object' ? p.timeZone : undefined,
            scheduleRoom: typeof p === 'object' ? p.room : undefined,
            sessionUrl: typeof p === 'object' ? p.sessionUrl : undefined,
        };
    }).filter(Boolean);
}

function formatDateRange(start: Date, end?: Date): string {
    const utc = { timeZone: 'UTC' as const };
    if (!end || start.getTime() === end.getTime()) {
        return start.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { 
            weekday: 'long',
            month: 'long', 
            day: 'numeric', 
            year: 'numeric',
            ...utc
        });
    }
    const sameMonth = start.getUTCMonth() === end.getUTCMonth() && start.getUTCFullYear() === end.getUTCFullYear();
    if (sameMonth) {
        return `${start.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'long', day: 'numeric', ...utc })} - ${end.getUTCDate()}, ${end.getUTCFullYear()}`;
    }
    return `${start.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'long', day: 'numeric', ...utc })} - ${end.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'long', day: 'numeric', year: 'numeric', ...utc })}`;
}

function formatLocation(loc: any): string {
    if (loc.virtual) return 'Virtual Event';
    const parts = [];
    if (loc.venue) parts.push(loc.venue);
    parts.push(loc.city);
    if (loc.state) parts.push(loc.state);
    parts.push(loc.country);
    return parts.join(', ');
}

// Determine if event is upcoming based on start date
const now = new Date();
const isUpcoming = event.data.startDate \>= now;

const tabs = [
    { id: 'about', label: 'About' },
    { id: 'presentations', label: `My Presentations (${linkedPresentations.length})` },
];

// Get current tab from URL
const currentTab = Astro.url.searchParams.get('tab') || 'about';

const typeLabels: Record\<string, string\> = {
    'conference': 'Conference',
    'meetup': 'Meetup',
    'webinar': 'Webinar',
    'podcast': 'Podcast',
    'workshop': 'Workshop',
    'user-group': 'User Group',
    'corporate': 'Corporate Event',
    'other': 'Event',
};
---

\<BaseLayout 
    title={event.data.title}
    description={event.data.description || `Speaking engagement at ${event.data.title}`}
    ogImage={event.data.heroImage}
\>
    \<section class="event-header"\>
        \<div class="container"\>
            \<div class="header-content"\>
                \<div class="event-logo"\>
                    \<img 
                        src={event.data.heroImage || '/images/events/default-event.svg'} 
                        alt={`${event.data.title} logo`}
                    /\>
                \</div\>
                \<div class="event-info"\>
                    \<div class="event-meta"\>
                        {isUpcoming ? (
                            \<Badge variant="primary"\>Upcoming\</Badge\>
                        ) : (
                            \<Badge variant="default"\>Past Event\</Badge\>
                        )}
                        \<Badge variant="secondary"\>
                            {typeLabels[event.data.eventType] || event.data.eventType}
                        \</Badge\>
                        {event.data.location.virtual && \<Badge variant="outline"\>Virtual\</Badge\>}
                    \</div\>
                    
                    \<h1 class="event-title"\>{event.data.title}\</h1\>
                    
                    {event.data.description && (
                        \<p class="event-subtitle"\>{event.data.description}\</p\>
                    )}
                    
                    \<div class="event-details"\>
                        \<div class="detail-item"\>
                            \<span class="detail-icon"\>📅\</span\>
                            \<span class="detail-text"\>{formatDateRange(event.data.startDate, event.data.endDate)}\</span\>
                        \</div\>
                        \<div class="detail-item"\>
                            \<span class="detail-icon"\>📍\</span\>
                            \<span class="detail-text"\>{formatLocation(event.data.location)}\</span\>
                        \</div\>
                        {event.data.audience && (
                            \<div class="detail-item"\>
                                \<span class="detail-icon"\>👥\</span\>
                                \<span class="detail-text"\>{event.data.audience} attendees\</span\>
                            \</div\>
                        )}
                    \</div\>
                \</div\>
            \</div\>
        \</div\>
    \</section\>

    \<!-- Tab Navigation --\>
    \<div class="tabs-container"\>
        \<div class="container"\>
            \<TabNav 
                tabs={tabs.map(t =\> ({ ...t, href: `?tab=${t.id}` }))} 
                activeTab={currentTab} 
            /\>
        \</div\>
    \</div\>

    \<!-- Tab Content --\>
    \<section class="section tab-content"\>
        \<div class="container"\>
            \<!-- About Tab --\>
            \<div class="tab-panel" data-tab="about" style={currentTab !== 'about' ? 'display: none;' : ''}\>
                \<div class="prose"\>
                    \<Content /\>
                \</div\>
                
                {event.data.website && (
                    \<div class="event-links"\>
                        \<Button href={event.data.website} variant="primary"\>
                            Visit Event Website ↗
                        \</Button\>
                    \</div\>
                )}

                {event.data.photos && event.data.photos.length \> 0 && (
                    \<div class="photos-section"\>
                        \<h2\>Photos\</h2\>
                        \<div class="photos-grid"\>
                            {event.data.photos.map((photo: string) =\> (
                                \<div class="photo-item"\>
                                    \<img src={photo} alt="Event photo" loading="lazy" /\>
                                \</div\>
                            ))}
                        \</div\>
                    \</div\>
                )}
            \</div\>

            \<!-- Presentations Tab --\>
            \<div class="tab-panel" data-tab="presentations" style={currentTab !== 'presentations' ? 'display: none;' : ''}\>
                {linkedPresentations.length \> 0 ? (
                    \<div class="presentations-list"\>
                        \<h2\>My Sessions at This Event\</h2\>
                        \<div class="grid grid-3"\>
                            {linkedPresentations.map((presentation) =\> (
                                \<PresentationCard
                                    title={presentation.data.title}
                                    description={presentation.data.description}
                                    slug={presentation.id}
                                    detailsHref={presentation.detailsHref}
                                    thumbnail={presentation.data.heroImage}
                                    presentationType={presentation.data.type}
                                    tags={presentation.data.tags}
                                    showSchedule={true}
                                    sessionName={presentation.sessionName}
                                    scheduleDate={presentation.scheduleDate}
                                    scheduleTime={presentation.scheduleTime}
                                    scheduleTimeZone={presentation.scheduleTimeZone}
                                    scheduleRoom={presentation.scheduleRoom}
                                    sessionUrl={presentation.sessionUrl}
                                /\>
                            ))}
                        \</div\>
                    \</div\>
                ) : (
                    \<div class="empty-state"\>
                        \<p\>No presentations listed for this event yet.\</p\>
                    \</div\>
                )}
            \</div\>
        \</div\>
    \</section\>

    \<TabSyncScript /\>
\</BaseLayout\>

\<style\>
    .event-header {
        background-color: var(--color-bg-secondary);
        padding: var(--spacing-10) 0;
    }

    .header-content {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: 200px 1fr;
        gap: var(--spacing-8);
        align-items: start;
    }

    .event-logo {
        background-color: var(--color-bg-primary);
        border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
        padding: var(--spacing-4);
        box-shadow: var(--shadow-md);
    }

    .event-logo img {
        width: 100%;
        height: auto;
        object-fit: contain;
    }

    .event-meta {
        display: flex;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
        gap: var(--spacing-2);
        margin-bottom: var(--spacing-4);
    }

    .event-title {
        font-size: var(--font-size-4xl);
        margin-bottom: var(--spacing-4);
        line-height: 1.2;
    }

    .event-subtitle {
        font-size: var(--font-size-lg);
        color: var(--color-text-secondary);
        margin-bottom: var(--spacing-4);
        max-width: 800px;
    }

    .event-details {
        margin-bottom: var(--spacing-4);
    }

    .detail-item {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: var(--spacing-2);
        margin-bottom: var(--spacing-2);
        font-size: var(--font-size-lg);
    }

    .detail-icon {
        font-size: 1.25rem;
    }

    .detail-text {
        color: var(--color-text-secondary);
    }

    .event-actions {
        display: flex;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
        gap: var(--spacing-3);
    }

    .tabs-container {
        background-color: var(--color-bg-primary);
        border-bottom: 1px solid var(--color-border);
        position: sticky;
        top: 0;
        z-index: 10;
    }

    .tab-content {
        padding: var(--spacing-10) 0;
    }

    .tab-panel {
        animation: fadeIn 0.3s ease-in;
    }

    @keyframes fadeIn {
        from {
            opacity: 0;
            transform: translateY(10px);
        }
        to {
            opacity: 1;
            transform: translateY(0);
        }
    }

    .prose {
        max-width: 800px;
        line-height: 1.7;
        margin-bottom: var(--spacing-8);
    }

    .prose h2 {
        margin-top: var(--spacing-8);
        margin-bottom: var(--spacing-4);
    }

    .prose p {
        margin-bottom: var(--spacing-4);
    }

    .event-links {
        margin-top: var(--spacing-6);
    }

    .presentations-list h2 {
        margin-bottom: var(--spacing-6);
    }

    .empty-state {
        text-align: center;
        padding: var(--spacing-12) var(--spacing-4);
        color: var(--color-text-secondary);
    }

    .photos-section {
        margin-top: var(--spacing-10);
    }

    .photos-section h2 {
        margin-bottom: var(--spacing-6);
    }

    .photos-grid {
        display: grid;
        grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(250px, 1fr));
        gap: var(--spacing-4);
    }

    .photo-item {
        border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
        overflow: hidden;
        aspect-ratio: 16 / 10;
    }

    .photo-item img {
        width: 100%;
        height: 100%;
        object-fit: cover;
    }

    @media (max-width: 768px) {
        .header-content {
            grid-template-columns: 1fr;
        }

        .event-logo {
            max-width: 200px;
        }

        .event-title {
            font-size: var(--font-size-3xl);
        }
    }
\</style\>

\<script\>
    // Client-side tab switching
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () =\> {
        const tabLinks = document.querySelectorAll('.tab-item');
        const tabPanels = document.querySelectorAll('.tab-panel');
        
        tabLinks.forEach(link =\> {
            link.addEventListener('click', (e) =\> {
                e.preventDefault();
                const targetTab = link.getAttribute('data-tab');
                
                // Update active tab styling
                tabLinks.forEach(l =\> l.classList.remove('tab-active'));
                link.classList.add('tab-active');
                
                // Show/hide panels
                tabPanels.forEach(panel =\> {
                    if (panel.getAttribute('data-tab') === targetTab) {
                        panel.style.display = '';
                    } else {
                        panel.style.display = 'none';
                    }
                });
                
                // Update URL without reload
                const url = new URL(window.location.href);
                url.searchParams.set('tab', targetTab);
                window.history.pushState({}, '', url);
            });
        });
    });
\</script\>
```

---

### **11. `src/pages/speaking/[eventSlug]/presentations.astro` - Event Presentations Redirect**
Redirect page that routes to the event presentations tab.

```astro
---
import BaseLayout from '../../../layouts/BaseLayout.astro';
import { getCollection } from 'astro:content';

export async function getStaticPaths() {
    const events = await getCollection('events');

    return events.map((event) =\> ({
        params: { eventSlug: event.id },
        props: {
            targetPath: `/speaking/${event.id}?tab=presentations`,
            eventTitle: event.data.title,
        },
    }));
}

const { targetPath, eventTitle } = Astro.props;
---

\<BaseLayout
    title={`${eventTitle} Presentations`}
    description={`Redirecting to the presentations tab for ${eventTitle}.`}
    canonicalUrl={new URL(targetPath, Astro.url.origin).toString()}
\>
    \<section class="section"\>
        \<div class="container redirect-page"\>
            \<h1\>Redirecting...\</h1\>
            \<p\>If you are not redirected automatically, continue to \<a id="redirect-link" href={targetPath}\>presentations for this event\</a\>.\</p\>
        \</div\>
    \</section\>

    \<script is:inline\>
        const redirectLink = document.getElementById('redirect-link');
        if (redirectLink instanceof HTMLAnchorElement) {
            window.location.replace(redirectLink.href);
        }
    \</script\>
\</BaseLayout\>

\<style\>
    .redirect-page {
        text-align: center;
        max-width: 760px;
    }
\</style\>
```

---

### **12. `src/pages/speaking/[eventSlug]/presentations/[sessionSlug].astro` - Individual Session at Event**
Engagement presentation page (session details for a presentation at a specific event).

```astro
---
import { getCollection } from 'astro:content';
import EngagementPresentationPage from '@/components/presentations/EngagementPresentationPage.astro';
import { getCanonicalPath } from '@/lib/engagementPresentations';

export async function getStaticPaths() {
    const engagementPresentations = await getCollection('engagementPresentations');

    return engagementPresentations.map((engagement) =\> ({
        params: {
            eventSlug: engagement.data.eventSlug,
            sessionSlug: engagement.data.sessionSlug,
        },
        props: { engagement },
    }));
}

const { engagement } = Astro.props;

const [events, presentations] = await Promise.all([
    getCollection('events'),
    getCollection('presentations'),
]);

const event = events.find((entry) =\> entry.id === engagement.data.eventSlug);
const presentation = presentations.find((entry) =\> entry.id === engagement.data.presentationSlug);

const canonicalPath = getCanonicalPath(engagement);
const canonicalUrl = new URL(canonicalPath, Astro.url.origin).toString();
---

\<EngagementPresentationPage
    engagement={engagement}
    event={event}
    presentation={presentation}
    canonicalUrl={canonicalUrl}
/\>
```

---

### **13. `src/pages/blog/index.astro` - Blog Listing Page**
Browse all published blog posts with category filtering.

```astro
---
import BaseLayout from '../../layouts/BaseLayout.astro';
import PageHeader from '../../components/ui/PageHeader.astro';
import BlogCard from '../../components/cards/BlogCard.astro';
import { getCollection } from 'astro:content';

// Get all published blog posts
let posts: any[] = [];
try {
    posts = await getCollection('blog', ({ data }) =\> !data.draft);
    posts = posts.sort((a, b) =\> b.data.pubDate.getTime() - a.data.pubDate.getTime());
} catch (e) {
    // Collection might not exist yet
}

// Get all categories and tags
const categories = [...new Set(posts.map(p =\> p.data.category))];
---

\<BaseLayout 
    title="Blog" 
    description="Articles and thoughts on technology, speaking, community, and more by Chad Green."
\>
    \<PageHeader title="Blog"\>
        \<p\>Thoughts on technology, speaking, and community\</p\>
    \</PageHeader\>

    \<section class="section"\>
        \<div class="container"\>
            \<!-- Category Filter --\>
            {categories.length \> 1 && (
                \<div class="filter-controls"\>
                    \<button class="filter-btn active" data-filter="all"\>All\</button\>
                    {categories.map((category) =\> (
                        \<button class="filter-btn" data-filter={category}\>{category}\</button\>
                    ))}
                \</div\>
            )}

            {posts.length \> 0 ? (
                \<div class="blog-grid grid grid-3" id="blog-grid"\>
                    {posts.map((post) =\> (
                        \<div class="blog-item" data-category={post.data.category}\>
                            \<BlogCard
                                title={post.data.title}
                                description={post.data.description}
                                slug={post.id}
                                pubDate={post.data.pubDate}
                                heroImage={post.data.heroImage}
                                category={post.data.category}
                                tags={post.data.tags}
                                featured={post.data.featured}
                            /\>
                        \</div\>
                    ))}
                \</div\>
            ) : (
                \<div class="empty-state"\>
                    \<h3\>No Blog Posts Yet\</h3\>
                    \<p\>Check back soon for articles and insights.\</p\>
                \</div\>
            )}
        \</div\>
    \</section\>
\</BaseLayout\>

\<style\>
    .filter-controls {
        display: flex;
        flex-wrap: wrap;
        gap: var(--spacing-2);
        margin-bottom: var(--spacing-8);
        justify-content: center;
    }

    .filter-btn {
        padding: var(--spacing-2) var(--spacing-4);
        background-color: var(--color-bg-secondary);
        border: 1px solid var(--color-border);
        border-radius: var(--radius-full);
        font-size: var(--font-size-sm);
        font-weight: var(--font-weight-medium);
        color: var(--color-text-secondary);
        cursor: pointer;
        transition: all var(--transition-fast);
    }

    .filter-btn:hover {
        border-color: var(--color-primary);
        color: var(--color-primary);
    }

    .filter-btn.active {
        background-color: var(--color-primary);
        border-color: var(--color-primary);
        color: var(--color-text-inverse);
    }

    .blog-item {
        transition: opacity var(--transition-fast);
    }

    .blog-item.hidden {
        display: none;
    }

    .empty-state {
        text-align: center;
        padding: var(--spacing-16);
        background-color: var(--color-bg-secondary);
        border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
    }

    .empty-state h3 {
        margin-bottom: var(--spacing-2);
    }

    .empty-state p {
        color: var(--color-text-secondary);
        margin-bottom: 0;
    }
\</style\>

\<script\>
    const filterBtns = document.querySelectorAll('.filter-btn');
    const items = document.querySelectorAll('.blog-item');

    filterBtns.forEach(btn =\> {
        btn.addEventListener('click', () =\> {
            const filter = (btn as HTMLElement).dataset.filter;

            // Update active state
            filterBtns.forEach(b =\> b.classList.remove('active'));
            btn.classList.add('active');

            // Filter items
            items.forEach(item =\> {
                const category = (item as HTMLElement).dataset.category;
                if (filter === 'all' || category === filter) {
                    item.classList.remove('hidden');
                } else {
                    item.classList.add('hidden');
                }
            });
        });
    });
\</script\>
```

---

### **14. `src/pages/blog/[slug].astro` - Individual Blog Post**
Detailed blog post page with metadata and content rendering.

```astro
---
import BlogLayout from '../../layouts/BlogLayout.astro';
import { getCollection, render } from 'astro:content';

export async function getStaticPaths() {
    const posts = await getCollection('blog');
    return posts.map((post) =\> ({
        params: { slug: post.id },
        props: { post },
    }));
}

const { post } = Astro.props;
const { Content } = await render(post);
---

\<BlogLayout
    title={post.data.title}
    description={post.data.description}
    pubDate={post.data.pubDate}
    updatedDate={post.data.updatedDate}
    heroImage={post.data.heroImage}
    heroImageAlt={post.data.heroImageAlt}
    category={post.data.category}
    tags={post.data.tags}
    author={post.data.author}
\>
    \<Content /\>
\</BlogLayout\>
```

---

### **15. `src/pages/blog/tags/[tag].astro` - Blog Posts by Tag**
Browse blog posts filtered by specific tag.

```astro
---
import BaseLayout from '../../../layouts/BaseLayout.astro';
import PageHeader from '../../../components/ui/PageHeader.astro';
import BlogCard from '../../../components/cards/BlogCard.astro';
import { getCollection } from 'astro:content';

export async function getStaticPaths() {
    const posts = await getCollection('blog', ({ data }) =\> !data.draft);
    
    // Get all unique tags
    const allTags = new Set\<string\>();
    posts.forEach(post =\> {
        post.data.tags?.forEach(tag =\> allTags.add(tag));
    });

    return Array.from(allTags).map(tag =\> ({
        params: { tag },
        props: {
            tag,
            posts: posts.filter(post =\> post.data.tags?.includes(tag))
                .sort((a, b) =\> b.data.pubDate.getTime() - a.data.pubDate.getTime())
        }
    }));
}

const { tag, posts } = Astro.props;
---

\<BaseLayout 
    title={`Posts tagged "${tag}"`}
    description={`All blog posts tagged with ${tag}`}
\>
    \<PageHeader title={`Tag: #${tag}`}\>
        \<p\>{posts.length} post{posts.length !== 1 ? 's' : ''} with this tag\</p\>
    \</PageHeader\>

    \<section class="section"\>
        \<div class="container"\>
            \<div class="blog-grid grid grid-3"\>
                {posts.map((post: any) =\> (
                    \<BlogCard
                        title={post.data.title}
                        description={post.data.description}
                        slug={post.id}
                        pubDate={post.data.pubDate}
                        heroImage={post.data.heroImage}
                        category={post.data.category}
                        tags={post.data.tags}
                    /\>
                ))}
            \</div\>
        \</div\>
    \</section\>
\</BaseLayout\>
```

### **16. `src/pages/meetups/index.astro` - Meetups Listing Page**
Browse all community meetup groups organized or co-organized by Chad.

```astro
---
import BaseLayout from '../../layouts/BaseLayout.astro';
import PageHeader from '../../components/ui/PageHeader.astro';
import MeetupCard from '../../components/cards/MeetupCard.astro';
import { getCollection } from 'astro:content';

// Get all meetup groups
const meetupGroups = await getCollection('meetupGroups');
---

\<BaseLayout 
    title="Meetups" 
    description="Community meetups and user groups organized or co-organized by Chad Green."
\>
    \<PageHeader title="Meetups"\>
        \<p\>Community groups I organize and participate in\</p\>
    \</PageHeader\>

    \<section class="section"\>
        \<div class="container"\>
            {meetupGroups.length \> 0 ? (
                \<div class="meetups-grid grid grid-3"\>
                    {meetupGroups.map((group) =\> (
                        \<MeetupCard
                            name={group.data.title}
                            slug={group.data.slug}
                            shortDescription={group.data.description}
                            thumbnail={group.data.heroImage}
                            city={group.data.city}
                            role={group.data.role}
                            meetupUrl={group.data.website}
                        /\>
                    ))}
                \</div\>
            ) : (
                \<div class="empty-state"\>
                    \<h3\>No Meetups Yet\</h3\>
                    \<p\>Check back soon for community groups I'm involved with.\</p\>
                \</div\>
            )}
        \</div\>
    \</section\>
\</BaseLayout\>

\<style\>
    .empty-state {
        text-align: center;
        padding: var(--spacing-16);
        background-color: var(--color-bg-secondary);
        border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
    }

    .empty-state h3 {
        margin-bottom: var(--spacing-2);
    }

    .empty-state p {
        color: var(--color-text-secondary);
        margin-bottom: 0;
    }
\</style\>
```
